Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: I sat with the Republicans (on purpose!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I look forward to continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make meaningful progress on the issues that matter most.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58834626/392387270/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230216-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODk4NzY2NC01OWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2shOuKLH3NJzDye3Q66-UUNJTayhq8cfenBnp7ZJnOU=)
---
| Folks,

At last week’s State of the Union address, I made a point of sitting with my fellow Michigan freshman on the righthand side of the chamber – traditionally the side where Republicans sit. My colleague is a Republican representing the East Side of the State. While we don’t always see eye to eye on policy issues, we find lots of common ground – we’re from the same state, we’re both committed to protecting our water in Michigan, and we’re LITERALLY next-door neighbors in our House office building.

We made the active choice to sit together as a symbol of our commitment to no-nonsense problem-solving.**I’m looking for partners who are ready to make real policy change, not play partisan games.**

While I appreciated the positive spirit of the President’s State of the Union address – and as anyone who knows me will tell you, I am a relentless optimist – we must keep in mind the real struggles that so many families in West Michigan and across the nation continue to face on a daily basis. For too many working parents, rising gas and grocery prices make it hard to feel optimistic. **That’s why I was proud to demonstrate my commitment to real solutions, not hyper partisan talking points, by sitting with my Republican colleague.**

I look forward to continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make meaningful progress on the issues that matter most. clean_body: I look forward to continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make meaningful progress on the issues that matter most. | = | Folks, At last week’s State of the Union address, I made a point of sitting with my fellow Michigan freshman on the righthand side of the chamber – traditionally the side where Republicans sit. My colleague is a Republican representing the East Side of the State. While we don’t always see eye to eye on policy issues, we find lots of common ground – we’re from the same state, we’re both committed to protecting our water in Michigan, and we’re LITERALLY next-door neighbors in our House office building. We made the active choice to sit together as a symbol of our commitment to no-nonsense problem-solving.I’m looking for partners who are ready to make real policy change, not play partisan games. While I appreciated the positive spirit of the President’s State of the Union address – and as anyone who knows me will tell you, I am a relentless optimist – we must keep in mind the real struggles that so many families in West Michigan and across the nation continue to face on a daily basis. For too many working parents, rising gas and grocery prices make it hard to feel optimistic. That’s why I was proud to demonstrate my commitment to real solutions, not hyper partisan talking points, by sitting with my Republican colleague. I look forward to continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make meaningful progress on the issues that matter most. = | = Gratefully, Hillary P.S. * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . clean_body: I missed my mid-month deadline | Friend, I don't mean to alarm you, but I have some terrible news. And the Radical left is using this missed deadline to mount an assault on our American Values and our Freedoms. Without your support, I don't know If I would be able to fight them and preserve the things we hold dear. | I need your help to make up ground so we don't miss another CRITICAL deadline. I hate asking, but I cannot do it without you, friend. God Bless, Kevin Hern Rep. Ok - 01 Chairman - Republican Study Committee Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund House Conservative Victory Fund 9521-B Riverside Pkwy, #350 Tulsa, OK, 74137

name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Howard Schultz is a disgrace for dodging Bernie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders called Howard Schultz to
testify before the HELP committee to answer for his illegal union busting.
Instead of taking any accountability, Schultz is refusing to testify and
counting on his power as a billionaire to avoid any consequences.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1009&akid=4028%2E5885482%2EMDMNSI ]The Starbucks CEO is now attacking Bernie with the full weight of his
financial resources and we need to have his back. Pitch in here to stand
with Our Revolution and help Bernie fight union-busting!

—Begin Forwarded Message—

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1010&akid=4028%2E5885482%2EMDMNSI ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Starbucks founder and CEO Howard Schultz
was personally named in complaints filed by the general counsel of the
National Labor Relations Board for union busting.

After years of posturing as an employee-friendly company, Schultz led
Starbucks’ union busting efforts — closing stores, firing staff supportive
of unionization, withholding pay raises, and even going as far as to hire
notorious former CIA and Pinkerton operatives to disrupt organizing!

Bernie Sanders called on Schultz to testify before the Health, Education
Labor and Pensions Committee in the US Senate. And, now, despite the
likelihood of a legally binding subpoena to answer questions about
Starbucks’ questionable labor practices, Howard Schultz is refusing to
testify.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1011&akid=4028%2E5885482%2EMDMNSI ]Empathy-free billionaires like Howard Schultz think they’re above the
law, and they’ll use vast resources to try to smear Bernie and avoid
accountability. Can we count on you to have Bernie’s back by pitching in
to help us fight back?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8350?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1012&akid=4028%2E5885482%2EMDMNSI ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8351?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1013&akid=4028%2E5885482%2EMDMNSI ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

Friends,
Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1st. **That means you can make a $50 donation to my campaign and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota. **
It’s easy to claim your refund. After you donate, my team will send you a receipt and a 2023 PCR application in the mail. After completing the PCR application, simply mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue and they’ll mail back your refund.
According to our numbers, we only need to raise $7,000 more this month to close our funding gap. I was hoping since you haven’t taken advantage of your PCR yet, you might be able to help us meet our goal and close the gap.

name: Team DNC
subject: How do you feel about Medicare and Social Security?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
President Biden needs to know: Do you support Democrats in protecting Medicare and Social Security or do you support Republicans proposing to end the programs as we know them for from millions of families? | |
---
Derek, while President Biden has taken action to strengthen Medicare and Social Security, for years Republican members of Congress have repeatedly tried to cut Medicare spending. Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) has even presented a policy plan to sunset both programs and Sen. Ron Johnson (R-WI) called it a “Ponzi scheme." Medicare and Social Security are bedrock programs that Americans have paid into and that tens of millions of seniors depend on to support their livelihoods. But just last week, House Republicans introduced legislation to repeal President Biden’s _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which would give tens of billions of dollars in subsidies back to Big Pharma, raise seniors’ prescription drug prices, and raise taxes on an estimated 14.5 million people -- all while increasing the deficit. **We cannot stand on the sideline.** So, at this critical moment, we need to know your thoughts: **Do you support Democrats in protecting Medicare and Social Security or Republican efforts to cut them?**

subject: Pete Buttigieg is laughing in your face

body:
| | Pete Buttigieg is laughing in your face.
When a horrific train derailment spewed tons of toxic chemicals into a community in Ohio, his response was, "**we need less white construction workers. "**
When he secretly took two months paternity leave to spend time with his husband & family, he criticized the hard-working Americans who expected their transportation secretary to do his job.
And when America's supply chain was crippled, he went on a bizarre rant calling America's roads & bridges racist.
America is being humiliated because of Pete Buttigieg, and he laughs at every hard-working Patriot who is suffering because of it.
We're organizing a massive GOP response to put Pete in his place, but it needs to happen right now.
All we're asking for is an answer to this one question:

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor?

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0t6fm9hs7o6ldn4h3i6datiia0i3e43hk90hnbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs2de6rammtf7jt26l4ucc371p2b87okuuccvgk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times'_ "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2023. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6jsp5q6cn48p96s0uevr70ahefcj3ae5sq746qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znn59ni24mkjk9c894shddeka7ch6gjknjmdnpc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfa635m0hnt13aep6rph35ob4ik74ckhut7eq4go_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zteo6nsajon31ticpv4rmi3g8u0aqdmlrftsfu9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhnaqu6s8inbj13sobt58oq7q65uci2802dl1olg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4clh2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."

---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections...__... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children...And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it![**Specifically, I'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMjE1X0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVWX0FFLUZGTyJ9/N3yAQSByJEbPKP2rFeJjUA) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change...And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on.Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors.Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them.The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable......and that's where you come in.[**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMjE1X0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVWX0FFLUZGTyJ9/BR-znN7hEMN2l84BX5MpBQ)Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMjE1X0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVWX0FFLUZGTyJ9/GFqOwiIktrm_83sqma072A)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children...With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3q665aqeqvsgjunuorrinoasvimh3c77reo5mug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaurl74r8esjvl5np6hr2fnjba8m48212ek60vf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6fmumcullrj780lpl91gb75q4uafodaigj3kegg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z38472sei62944rop5e6cp6rl5hmsqsimchqvkho_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf5nk2opm4tukev9r6rdkh1vc0oe11sn6tfo4rso_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmoqjob9lig373k6597cd130ofrnevg9lmonekho_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2svv7pddgggtm493m57nclclh2sih5lqins24uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlnr612mdav3kf2g52it1hrl9lriaog99lq8nee0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zocgrmjb74afid0l57egmsqvca5qdu6vjc2egvuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2f3otcqhtba1l2c954cefn5t4df8803th6u4o6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z46s88sfkjnp5uh2cu0t6phl45tdr3d39ui0jqu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqor1oki1dlt63pd4av730g8lfivpd8d6hd0fqq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj68or4c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

subject: H.R. 5376 Turns 401(k)s Into “National Property”
body:
Biden just made the lives of American retirement savers much harder.

| | | |
# **Biden’s Sneaky H.R. 5376 Is A Nightmare For 401(k) And IRA Savers**
---
### **Biden’s Sneaky H.R. 5376 Is A Nightmare For 401(k) And IRA Savers**

| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here.

Biden just made the lives of American retirement savers much harder.

_And the mainstream media is ignoring this story!_

**Here’s what happened:**

Joe Biden couldn’t get his “Build Back Better” bill passed last year because everyone knew it would cause **more inflation**. So he stubbornly pushed it through Washington in “H.R. 5376”.

Without a doubt, this sneaky move confirms what I’ve always believed:
* Governments will never stop printing fiat currency until it is worthless!
* Anyone keeping their savings in dollars or stocks should consider smarter options, TODAY!

---
| | _So is there something you can do?_

YES! Physical gold offers an opportunity to **escape wealth confiscation**. And the best way to protect your savings with gold is through a PHYSICAL GOLD IRA.

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhsgih7ovk568dq4geqiqt2kdgdmjrg7cboovtg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs96r1tcuoi1jpv5pe29jm6tmbs45cssvse9o8f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlb2kanjcdlebfn1rbo4tus51rf0knqv6dkkfqk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrld96a6d823bb09532s5rqqrcgo7gioa8pkv52o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z84v8l9niu638j36ll5gk2ombmtfiopmak70iruo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo3i46irdc1ftsvo7op3ak9h2it335nkhnvoq228_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn6iek2bf8rth6luesck8kljc1gn4tm3aib2dpr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlnc34hsc77ii46gvhd7d7t8isgqv79hm7lkfm10_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmpardsb9j4jjtpb5dqfb8b85tm83vdfjmeh3tug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8p63qv9a7iucotkspvlmstgal4pa3mbqrma3eo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1gmkl9rmgfd97jrvs943rhvq3pn0rai68s9hg3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfdgcegr2tcefsblsff7q9m47q9hd35mnr15thn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj6aoj4cph2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture."

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq3cgatclokajgr2tag5lnr4jomq95poqaaak2so_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj61o72cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zonu4tkkol0fi3sd31b7ed0le39nvnhf86gcnh18_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj61o72cdh2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4a0ijsvopapr5dm3npsr605u2r2hdojg356i0c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj61o72cdh2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5gqoas2q46eee51c2s95uf57jl1e35ejspqbomg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdj61o72cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Freedom Caucus Member Steve Hopkins for Senate
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,

My name is Steve Hopkins and I am running for Mississippi State Senate to continue our fight for individual liberty and economic prosperity in Jackson.

I was born and raised in Southaven, went on to pursue higher education at Northwest Mississippi Community College and Ole Miss, married my beautiful wife Beckie, and have three children and two wonderful grandsons.

I was elected as Representative of District 7 in 2016 and have since been nationally recognized for my conservative voting record:
**A+ National Federation of Independent Business**
**A+ American Conservative Union**
**A+ Americans for Prosperity**
**A+ National Rifle Association**
During my two terms as a State Representative, I have singlehandedly stopped the proposed increase in the gas tax on more than one occasion. This issue is important to me because it's an unfair burden on working families and small businesses that rely on transportation for their
livelihoods.

By opposing the gas tax increase and fighting to abolish the state’s income tax, I am working to create a fairer economy in Mississippi and ensure that hard-working Mississippians can benefit from lower taxes.

I am running to bring the same principles of conservative excellence to the Mississippi Senate, including abolishing the income tax to combat inflation, supporting educational freedom by expanding parental rights, securing our elections once and for all, and defending our Constitutionally protected, God-given rights.
I am humbly asking for your grassroots donations to help me continue this fight for individual liberty and economic prosperity. Your generous support will go a long way in helping my campaign reach new heights and spread our message to the rest of Mississippi.

[**CLICK HERE TO MAKE A GENEROUS GRASSROOTS DONATION OF $20.23 OR MORE**](https://secure.anedot.com/hopkinsforsenate/contribute)****[**TODAY >>>**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/hPFUe8ddr2KUKpYJVK55mg)
Together, we will continue to make a difference in Jackson and bring about real change for hardworking Mississippi families.

For Liberty,
---

Steve Hopkins
Candidate for State Senate
District 1
P.S. If you would prefer to mail in your donation, all checks will be received at:
Friends of Steve Hopkins
1205 Worthington Dr.
Southaven, MS 38671

Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/w1dI1BBpXvibxvDelmXGBw) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07520%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=21AJUzpPbnyT32iIJrOQPQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07521%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u3i6NC9dqlDJIE1tHO5Zmw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07520%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=21AJUzpPbnyT32iIJrOQPQ&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07522%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4QYEUAyJkcLuYSwRi3Kh9g&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07520%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=21AJUzpPbnyT32iIJrOQPQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07523%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=STxju%2bfYrvhZ2w2u85ZPrA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07524%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P830YFUOjwrsHdNVkUeQYg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07535%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fL4UJ6jqocabqfRFeYNcXQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: John Kennedy
subject: Joe Biden is Weak on China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
We can’t let China walk all over us

We can’t let China walk all over us

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659208%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yTnU3GjXqtZc4bMlmw9fhQ&sysid=1)
---
Hey Friend,

_**President Xi thought it would be a good idea to fly a spy balloon across the United States. And guess what? Joe Biden agreed and allowed it to happen!**_

How the Biden Administration even allowed the Chinese spy balloon to get into U.S. airspace is beyond me. They are testing us, and Joe Biden is allowing them to walk all over us.

**_This is disgraceful._**

I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump.

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America 's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, _**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z659p9nnrbh5vr6desjb39ij6o2l4ojbpfcb004o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdgm4ob2cth2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I 've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that 's why I wrote my NEW BOOK, _The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I 'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK, _The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1mrp0vvbctkadau9mvqrhac7eflac0s7ic8e9g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdgm4ob2cth2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqfvjb0fvq7v1301jpgi4ha06jnc692ir337nkm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdgm4ob2cth2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn 't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfpjukfqeb0805gvktjrcf5si0h5fhmiq3v44nbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdgm4ob2cth2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that 's why I wrote my NEW BOOK, The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn 't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, . 625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... we're still fighting for David. The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David's criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David's criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We've brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we've retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. [**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9ffd4f9a3c1403299a8f77776f54b3c&_e=1U4HaOxo7LSz1z632UuMsITo8ER9_2yACtuD3LqEK3pGARuqdyhxpipBDfQ0mU3egxVVdyNtxSnbPnIQFRnwZmA3y9Z6KYk2AkH3geyAIyLMJ5VOBm6uyy4iH97kMNWExzfKX1K1P6iFoBIteSmo0yhGr6vC7vRIZIcQGryMKr01uhwrRnrCcCncRRUlLJYc23O8SaliKvURpy2Fp2XRWv5duGsHatKwZj9KCKZBSQQn4sbiUbzh8UyaQ6kpm7JgtPnOy7u6qOud1LO284Mnzh4fZ35Yr3Js1mYJVc5nCVqV1g3v3rhUShCzBvvkd-doYRwQk1tfF93Htrigy1s4ubIlH7EJc1xLE8oYd3dcc-8%3D) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we 're now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. body:

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e20224a-b482-4a69-9e6f-7ad898b5bc81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, have you had a chance to pitch in for this special election? _In 4 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ [**We Have FOUR Days To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6497ecf-af29-4a90-bdea-0c551735459b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is her message to voters: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_

| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T570f9f7b-ff34-4da7-a15d-29aa1530b6a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_We must ensure that in 4 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not that nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49fa7c60-54ec-4f67-8b4f-8f866ac5e606/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! [Get your book now](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3678161fff2f4b8a8ac48af508b884f2&_e=VBnLpIpZS1gvrNpPL-Lj4rwEizGGpGoMm-CsEmaTMLPcoD2ZjJB89K_9wysCSw7S1fmOggHxVyPNCVw_y2eNgigAMUZbzV4FK_TDCnJgGAbtbZ42tS3K0quEA_sG9ZKoXQSKW2mJd0xrIr0rezzZ1nv4MBA5V7uT4O_k0Q9XWoc32Fu93aWnNVnB6XoZl78L17EifTA4DigmNpG-rBBvqMVe_cjybkZ44acw5SjWAhn1qq9cxAeEw8T2XH4Rl1tVTpVyHkSjp8SZZltnaW_3FRpLb2vFkUeM0M8REqeuXeo%3D)

Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3678161fff2f4b8a8ac48af508b884f2&_e=VBnLpIpZS1gvrNpPL-Lj4rwEizGGpGoMm-CsEmaTMLPcoD2ZjJB89K_9wysCSw7S1fmOggHxVyPNCVw_y2eNgigAMUZbzV4FK_TDCnJgGAbtbZ42tS3K0quEA_sG9ZKoXQSKW2mJd0xrIr0rezzZ1nBCvdVlUb6EIKfYYqOS5Us04SqC1zcTlwjB4u5qHNpNazd2PoTgunjwvDu2PUUry3iUeRMQ_ixRVNhEpNv2228rZyqLJXnQ4LSeyQW5oZye3X5ECbUA5KmELqwcr6BtzOFaihR0nbx9iA7lJDIDFow%3D)

[Get your book now](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3678161fff2f4b8a8ac48af508b884f2&_e=VBnLpIpZS1gvrNpPL-Lj4rwEizGGpGoMm-CsEmaTMLPcoD2ZjJB89K_9wysCSw7S1fmOggHxVyPNCVw_y2eNgigAMUZbzV4FK_TDCnJgGAbtbZ42tS3K0quEA_sG9ZKoXQSKW2mJd0xrIr0rezzZ1jVKPQ0qpTI02Z2nrC92_nw2hAYYof9iDNmgR-Wqh8ezK0WNNLkRilGtIY9Qc2k9GuHe7Xifl_bn-tssxSZU-LUz84LeM4kd45k03m2SOPMPwfSTNjKluE1xmNvidz8PNgdHhvjhsp0DYGUh5ADZdVA%3D)

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who have changed the world for the better.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22474698530d41718a0cea81fb732d7e&_e=HAz8s5emzZjgsAPJfBqjlkq7LNYDQPdhtYRJh7MZDnC0Ybud9npabhzIQG8PTqg82DTzm60YEuvo5FhIJXmL-905ItclZTPkXNM6xOqAIAOmMnluhW-P6y8GXJCPtT3d2n0SfGVqBw1c0ZtKwQKbcgN49woaHoUGQ-dt_kHKX4adZbaixRAyRv7MEAy9sxCdEJJ1LL-cpAWgU4SgpHsGse5xdwtavYl021K-0dBOPeFmiE_N8htvzAfajkQMRGruhM_K-V6SV0epHBVxwiUR2571k41jUVAgweZZzQdluv0%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22474698530d41718a0cea81fb732d7e&_e=HAz8s5emzZjgsAPJfBqjlkq7LNYDQPdhtYRJh7MZDnC0Ybud9npabhzIQG8PTqg82DTzm60YEuvo5FhIJXmL-905ItclZTPkXNM6xOqAIAOmMnluhW-P6y8GXJCPtT3d2n0SfGVqBw1c0ZtKwQKbcoaDE6YnT6Vq3y3zg9VAhf6kATf4pPH0XvBPwvgdNK_7AZOXo1SEeRFoPuscuCVUBA1AQlb6oxprSvsAqja8p9pO5eboAW4xCDWaZ8nWrEC7V7L5_tKu8trvJglhaFkHXXPYZDDW-AMipEWJaM06mno%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22474698530d41718a0cea81fb732d7e&_e=HAz8s5emzZjgsAPJfBqjlkq7LNYDQPdhtYRJh7MZDnC0Ybud9npabhzIQG8PTqg82DTzm60YEuvo5FhIJXmL-905ItclZTPkXNM6xOqAIAOmMnluhW-P6y8GXJCPtT3d2n0SfGVqBw1c0ZtKwQKbcsa5rmVtT3EHM2-bdWYYA7SG6kH-yI9MjrIGbIO0lNU2ZmFcoI2N-V5P2y0qcKwQH8evKTnOqKxR4FlpqHOnp4-VowEkAflFgOPkfwws_U-lLmgBmiAuMrwgB0IwJGY6m7hUvPMsT-7ph8djrHGxjpg%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22474698530d41718a0cea81fb732d7e&_e=HAz8s5emzZjgsAPJfBqjlkq7LNYDQPdhtYRJh7MZDnC0Ybud9npabhzIQG8PTqg82DTzm60YEuvo5FhIJXmL-905ItclZTPkXNM6xOqAIAOmMnluhW-P6y8GXJCPtT3dJddxOszBjX9v83VwTxkHHjkFsBUfvB2k-5SraeKUKrZhwwkWnYEl8O_ujGEL8ahffiM44_Esac82DfTFguupl7AeRbu_OvIUY_iGDsZEqg1TD_NPxc_hTVgWIIDsaNtcfu2aO0SKJJBRA_zcaidjKGzW7l5pLZAAY20OCvrYwqI%3D)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: What it means to be pro-family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I'll put this bluntly, friend: **A country without paid leave is not pro-family. The U.S. is the _only_ industrialized nation in the world without paid family leave, despite overwhelming bipartisan support from American voters. Our politicians in Congress need to wake up.**
Everyone loves their family, and whether it's taking care of an elderly parent, the birth of a new child or a sick spouse, _Americans should not have to make the impossible choice between their family and their paycheck_
That's why I've spent the last decade pushing to make the fight to pass federal paid leave front and center in our Democratic agenda, and I won't stop until it's signed into law.

**But the only way progress ever comes is when we're fighting for it together, so I'm counting on 20,000 members of this team to raise their voices alongside mine today — including you, friend:[I](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864610/392488071/-1857887239?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=&emci=6f6ae200-4aad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5d753162-e9ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)****[f you agree that it's long past time for Congress to pass federal paid family and medical leave, please sign my petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864611/392488072/-1857887239?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=&emci=6f6ae200-4aad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5d753162-e9ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864612/392488073/-1857887239?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=&emci=6f6ae200-4aad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5d753162-e9ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
The fact of the matter is that nearly everyone will need to take time away from work at some point to care for a new child or family member. It leaves too many people with no other option than to quit their jobs at the very moment when they need a paycheck and health insurance the most._That doesn’t just harm individual families, it burdens the entire economy._
It's time to get this done for working families across our country, and I need your help to send a clear message that we won't back down — not until paid leave gets passed.
**[So please, sign my petition now to tell Congress to deliver for working families across our country by finally passing paid leave.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864613/392488074/-1857887239?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=&emci=6f6ae200-4aad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5d753162-e9ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
Thank you for refusing to let up in even the toughest fights,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864614/392488075/1575385346?code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864615/392488076/1575385346?code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58864616/392488077/1575385346?code=jtk3918-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc1MzE2Mi1lOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sg4dMcDnD42-QV7XQUwiCePZ5Mm5Cc9HnhXejrj-7nw=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

We have to protect our country from these growing threats
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334509:67xfgiGiN:m:1:3331421248:D509A62A357CC99BA292067F830098CD:r)
---
Peter,
---
Our national security is in grave danger because of Joe Biden's weak leadership.
---
After a Chinese Communist Party's spy balloon flew over the entire country for nearly a week, it's abundantly clear that we have to address our security gaps.
---
_**But according to Biden, the country is in the best position we 've ever been in!**_
---
That's why I went on Fox News to respond to Biden's comments about China and our national security threats to express the dire need to protect our country from this existential threat.
---
[**Please watch my response and then make a contribution to help me hold the Biden Administration accountable for its weak response to the growing threat from communist China.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334509:67xfgiGiN:m:1:3331421248:D509A62A357CC99BA292067F830098CD:r)
