For decades, liberal politicians like Biden have tried to sound tough when they're asked about combating the threat from communist China, yet when it's time to take action, they always fail to do so.
---
Of course, it isn't exactly surprising that Biden is soft on communist China when his own party won't even condemn socialism.
---
_**Just the other week, 86 House Democrats actually VOTED NO on a resolution denouncing the horrors of socialism!**_
---
House conservatives are committed to standing up to China.
---
_We will take these national security threats seriously and are doing everything we can to put America back on top of the world stage._
---
But as we fight to restore America's global standing, we're counting on _your_ sustained support.

| | | Senator John Fetterman has checked himself into a hospital in order to receive treatment for clinical depression. Fetterman has been through a lot, after suffering a near-fatal stroke during last year's campaign, and has shown tremendous courage through it all. We salute Senator Fetterman, and have no doubt he will be back soon. In the meantime, we stand with him and his family, and wish them the best. [**Tell John Fetterman: "We Support You, and Stand With You and Your Family"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7dcc07a-0045-46e2-a32f-c9b8ea29d498/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: Is it just a phase?
body:
It's common for young people to flirt with socialism.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh18t5vkh4d2n2pr1apn3n731f9fks79gtch8kv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
Friend,

It's common for young people to flirt with socialism.

But this infatuation can have dangerous consequences for all of us if it goes on too long... unfortunately, that's exactly what's been happening in America.

Luckily, the Dissident Project is here to remove the rose-colored glasses from the eyes of high school students so they can see socialism for the dangerous ideology it truly is.

My name is Daniel Di Martino, and I am the founder of the Dissent Project. We send survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the country to teach students the truth about socialism.

[_**I am humbly asking you to chip in $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn5ab9fahh8b528n8ovnrlcvmb5agpl50otrm798_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)

The Dissident Project hosts speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Eritrea, and Venezuela with unique stories that high schoolers need to hear.

And our speakers are in high demand!

**Our dissidents have already completed over 20 speeches across the country and are gearing up for a busy spring.**

I've been able to share my experience of fleeing Venezuela's socialist regime and the importance of preserving the liberties we enjoy in the United States with thousands of students this year.

Afterward, students lined up to take photos, and teachers gave me the opportunity to speak to their smaller classrooms as well.

**I even met a student from Venezuela with a similar story which sparked a much-needed conversation about freedom with her classmates.**

February is a new -- and busier -- month, with four upcoming speeches on the books. Your support helps our speakers present their stories at no cost to schools.

**Please support the Dissident Project today by _clicking below_.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z78if8as40gnt3gn8f9cbaa9g98i418e0b40h0jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpbkeg2vq3f92mdj0k5qt1hell0eamlbani6nthg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlhu1v1mvifdk4qm0vmv26p8e0u0ib4i72srmlo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zts6sila6cek3pgtm6fk675gn82rm4vfrudcjjdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9l6jsanil8ro6kfk6feql8g1kgjqo2ajv2uvpg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr3gh83bvfkeva9fe5b488vteuuvavmb0j9mnhkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrj9bf4ap5sdc898vd4rvukrbilh7n2jnio9ca68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zae93q2f4fqqtv6jsec49gjd7bdhn8gf0c8m57s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq0go9bstq9r9onoqbvrkdl7m99hhiafpib0l4tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)

As long as students hear about how socialism is simply about giving away free things, they will continue to believe that nothing can go wrong if they embrace it.

American students need to understand how dangerous socialism is.

**Your generous donation will help hundreds of high school students get over their interest in socialism and find a new love for freedom.**

[_**Will you help us show high school students why they need to break up with socialism? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6t3hpbkrj44s04uk12glaebvgrgmp1rlb761ago_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdimep70sdh2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Under the Biden Administration, Leadership is Lost
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Under the Biden Administration, Leadership is Lost_
---
"It's hard to believe this has to be said, but unlike this president, I’ll do my job and take responsibility. I won’t blame others.” That was then-candidate Joe Biden in 2020. The Joe Biden of today seems to have forgotten those words, as he — and many others in his administration — refuse to take responsibility for anything and show any resemblance of leadership. Early this month, President Biden was asked by a reporter if he took any blame for inflation. He responded by saying, "Do I take any blame for inflation? No. It was already here when I got here, man." Of course, inflation was at just 1.4% when he took office, and he gladly signed the Democrats' American Rescue Plan that pumped an additional $1.9 trillion of stimulus into the economy. Inflation began to surge shortly thereafter as the bill came to be referred to as the "original sin" of inflation. So much for "the buck stops with me." But that's just one example of many. What about the Afghanistan withdrawal? The crisis at the southern border? Gas prices? I'm sure that you could name more. And he's not the only one. Yesterday, Secretary Buttigieg, when discussing the train derailment disaster in Ohio stated, "While this horrible situation has gotten a particularly high amount of attention, there are roughly 1,000 cases a year of a train derailing." This was days _after_ he waited 10 days to even address the disaster and the role his agency would be playing in response to it. In this administration, leadership is lost. Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Banned from Russia, Hosting Many Visitors_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** chats with a kiddo during the Childhood Cancer Action Day at the statehouse._
---
This week,**Governor Eric Holcomb** was one of 77 Americans to**** receive the news that they had been sanctioned by the Russian government in retaliation for anti-Russian actions taken by the United States. As a part of the "black list," **Gov. Holcomb** has been permanently banned from entering the country. Here's what he had to say upon receiving the news on Tuesday. "Couldn't have received sweeter news on Valentine's Day, other than the gift of freedom and liberty to the Russian people living under Putin's oppressive reign." **Gov. Holcomb** also spent the week hosting numerous Hoosiers from across the state, meeting with members of the Arc of Indiana, cadets of the Indiana Civil Air Patrol, the Noblesville High School Jazz Ensemble, Queens from Indiana, and also attended Childhood Cancer Action Day at the statehouse. You can see photos from these meet-ups on the governor's [official Twitter page](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/2792a6a95e746622c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _Thank You, Huck_
---
**Matt Huckleby** , the executive director of the Indiana Republican Party, will step down from the position he's held since he was first appointed in 2017; today is his last day. Throughout his tenure, **Huckleby** worked alongside the chairman, the state committee and its members, and numerous staff to develop and execute a strategy that has led the party to unprecedented success over the past four election cycles. He will now serve as Vice President at MO Strategies. "I have had the great fortune to work with the best state party staff in the country, work for amazing candidates and party leaders from governor to mayors and county commissioners and so many county chairmen," stated **Huckleby**. "Together we have worked to build our party and ensure our candidates have the best infrastructure to carry them to victory." Thank you, **"Huck,"** for your years of service, for your mentorship, and all you have done to make the Indiana Republican Party the best state party in the nation. — Your Indiana Republican Party Staff
---
|
---
# _Become a Digital Member_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/9c2aee518a00bd01c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We’re not letting up for a moment to elect Republicans up and down the ballot across Indiana. Our strong and united Indiana Republican Party got the job done to keep our great state **dark red** on November 8, 2022, and now is the time to prepare for the fights ahead. You can help us do just that by [signing up for a digital membership](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/3f2671c81c84e248c3d6b838967d376c/40313) —you’ll receive a membership card in the mail and be an official part of our team of digital supporters that’s helping us keep Indiana a Republican stronghold.
---
| | |
---
# _Another Busy Week at the Statehouse_
---
Bills continue to move out of committees at the statehouse, while others have moved from one chamber to the other. _Priority Bills of House Republicans_ No priority bills passed the chamber this week (as of this writing), but bills continue to move with a few on a second reading. So far, HBs 1005, 1006, and 1007 have passed. _Priority Bills of Senate Republicans_ This week, [SB 1](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/1c337c75689862f0c3d6b838967d376c/40313), passed the chamber. SB 1 bolsters and expands access to mental health services for Hoosiers across the state by requiring the state Division of Mental Health and Addiction to create a toll-free helpline to offer confidential assistance and referrals to callers. It also calls for an expansion of mental health clinics across the state, among other things. Other priority bills have cleared committees and are on a second reading. Many other bills are moving. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/ce9e01a7587c1ea7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and check back here next week.
---
|
---
# _Washington Examiner: Finally unity: Public crushed by Bidenflation, 77% agree_

---
Last week, President Biden claimed that he's made real progress on delivering his "Unity Agenda." It's true, at least in one respect. From the [Washington Examiner](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/279092bbc462bb73c3d6b838967d376c/40313): President Joe Biden can finally say that he has united the country on at least one issue. Democrats, Republicans, and independents agree that the president’s inflationary policies are crushing them financially. In the latest [I&I;/TIPP poll,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3b576780d3129670/8d738950c014dc40c3d6b838967d376c/40313) taken Feb. 1-3 from 1,358 adults across the nation, 77% overall said that inflation is causing financial hardship. “This was one poll where Republicans, Democrats and independents all see eye-to-eye, with 75% of Democrats, 81% of Republicans, and 75% of independents saying they suffer the wrath of out-of-control inflation,” said the analysis. _Story continues._
---
|

"Together we have worked to build our party and ensure our candidates have the best infrastructure to carry them to victory." Thank you, "Huck," for your years of service, for your mentorship, and all you have done to make the Indiana Republican Party the best state party in the nation. — Your Indiana Republican Party Staff | Become a Digital Member We’re not letting up for a moment to elect Republicans up and down the ballot across Indiana. Our strong and united Indiana Republican Party got the job done to keep our great state dark red on November 8, 2022, and now is the time to prepare for the fights ahead. You can help us do just that by —you’ll receive a membership card in the mail and be an official part of our team of digital supporters that’s helping us keep Indiana a Republican stronghold. | | | Another Busy Week at the Statehouse Bills continue to move out of committees at the statehouse, while others have moved from one chamber to the other. Priority Bills of House Republicans No priority bills passed the chamber this week (as of this writing), but bills continue to move with a few on a second reading. So far, HBs 1005, 1006, and 1007 have passed. Priority Bills of Senate Republicans This week, , passed the chamber. SB 1 bolsters and expands access to mental health services for Hoosiers across the state by requiring the state Division of Mental Health and Addiction to create a toll-free helpline to offer confidential assistance and referrals to callers. It also calls for an expansion of mental health clinics across the state, among other things. Other priority bills have cleared committees and are on a second reading. Many other bills are moving. To stay up-to-date, visit and check back here next week. | Washington Examiner: Finally unity: Public crushed by Bidenflation, 77% agree Last week, President Biden claimed that he's made real progress on delivering his "Unity Agenda." It's true, at least in one respect. From the : President Joe Biden can finally say that he has united the country on at least one issue. Democrats, Republicans, and independents agree that the president’s inflationary policies are crushing them financially. In the latest taken Feb. 1-3 from 1,358 adults across the nation, 77% overall said that inflation is causing financial hardship. “This was one poll where Republicans, Democrats and independents all see eye-to-eye, with 75% of Democrats, 81% of Republicans, and 75% of independents saying they suffer the wrath of out-of-control inflation,” said the analysis. name: Justin Balik, Evergreen Action
subject: Good news and even better news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I'm excited to share this with you.
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4428?t=2&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE)
---
Friend,
Here's the good news: Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, there are billions of dollars available for states to reduce pollution, cut costs for families, and create good-paying jobs by investing in clean energy.
**Here's the even better news: States are rising to the moment.**
Battleground governors like Gretchen Whitmer, Tony Evers, and Michelle Lujan Grisham campaigned and won on climate. Now, voters expect their state leaders to deliver on those promises. Many are: We've seen a growing trend of states raising the bar on ambitious clean energy standards in just the last few weeks.
[_**With its 100% clean energy standard just signed into law, Minnesota is a prime example. That's why I'm so excited to share Evergreen's recent conversation with Michael Noble and Rep. Jamie Long about this game-changing legislation—check it out!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4428?t=3&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE)
[READ THE INTERVIEW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4428?t=4&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE)
---
That's just the tip of the iceberg. Across the nation, states are preparing to funnel billions of dollars from the Inflation Reduction Act directly into climate action and committing to even more ambitious standards:
* **New York** Governor Kathy Hochul proposed phasing out on-site fossil fuel combustion in new buildings coupled with nation-leading appliance standards to prohibit the sale of fossil fuel heating equipment.
* Governor Phil Murphy announced **New Jersey** will bump their 100% clean electricity standard up to 2035—15 years earlier than their current plan.
* Governor Janet Mills also announced her intention to bump **Maine's** clean electricity standard from 80% by 2035 to 100% by 2040.
* **Rhode Island** now requires the state's electricity be offset by renewable energy by 2033.

**This progress is heartening. But I'll level with you: Our work is not done yet.** To meet the magnitude of the climate crisis and build the just, thriving clean energy future we all deserve, we need states to rapidly and aggressively build on this momentum.
That's why Evergreen is pushing states to adopt clean car standards, electrify buildings, effectively and equitably deploy new federal funds, and enact clean energy standards.
[_**We outline exactly how they can do that in our first-of-its-kind guide to "Unlocking the IRA"—read and share it with your networks today, and we'll keep winning our clean energy future step by step, state by state.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4429?t=5&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE)
[SHARE THE GUIDE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4429?t=6&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE)
---
Onward,
Justin Balik
State Program Director
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2023 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=13289%2E53494%2ExaBNRE)

name: Team IDCCA
subject: Congratulations to our 2023 Party Builder honorees!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
The Illinois Democratic Party continues to grow thanks to all of your hard work and dedication.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/bWZh2iIAwMePO9WMAHgbHhOLhljz9s1pXiyxPL4F77Q=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_Logo)
Fellow Democrat,

Democrats from across Illinois will gather on Monday, March 6th, at the iconic Chicago Navy Pier to celebrate two of our partners in organized labor. Today, we're excited to bring you more details about this year's Party Builder Award honorees.

Please help congratulate **Deborah Cosey-Lane** , Secretary Treasurer at Amalgamated Transit Union (ATU Local 308), and **Michael Macellaio** , Chicago & Cook County Building Trades President, by joining us!

**[We'll tell you all about our amazing honorees in a moment, but first, we want to make sure you get the chance to participate in honoring them at the reception. Click the link now to see all the details and grab your tickets before it's too late!](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/LHP9JUP9JG5nkRaNTun3-eWfxNs44p7VBtCDBch38-0=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_L1)**
[**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/LHP9JUP9JG5nkRaNTun3-eWfxNs44p7VBtCDBch38-0=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_B1&amount=5)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/LHP9JUP9JG5nkRaNTun3-eWfxNs44p7VBtCDBch38-0=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_G1)
ATU Local 308 Secretary Treasurer **Deborah Cosey-Lane** is a 31-year member of the Amalgamated Transit Union and a 30-year union steward. First elected Secretary Treasurer in 2017, she was recently re-elected in 2020. In 2021, Deborah was elected President of the Amalgamated Transit Union Illinois Joint Conference, _making her the first woman and first African American to be elected to this position_. Deborah's outreach and advocacy also extend outside of her role with ATU. She has worked closely with many union partners as well as on behalf of President Joe Biden, Governor JB Pritzker, Mayor of Chicago Lori Lightfoot, and newly elected Congressman Jonathan Jackson.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/LHP9JUP9JG5nkRaNTun3-eWfxNs44p7VBtCDBch38-0=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_G2)
Chicago & Cook County Building Trades Council President **Michael Macellaio** has been involved in politics most of his life. His grandmother served as the Chicago 19th Ward Committeewoman and Democratic Party of Illinois State Central Committeewoman for the 3rd Congressional District, and his father was an active member of Pipefitter's Local 597. Attending union rallies, knocking on doors, and helping get Democrats elected was a way of life in the Macellaio house. Mike has previously served as the Labor Liaison and Prevailing Wage Officer for former State Comptroller and Deputy Governor Dan Hynes. He then went on to work for James Connolly and the Chicago Laborers' District Council Laborers-Employers Cooperation and Education Trust (LECET) as Director of Governmental Affairs. In 2016, Mike was elected Secretary Treasurer of the Chicago & Cook County Building Trades Council, and just last year, he was elected President.

In the words of IDCCA President Kristina Zahorik: "The IDCCA has a symbiotic relationship with organized labor. We work together to uplift and give voice to working people and families. As the grassroots arm of the Democratic Party, we are excited to honor the work Deborah Cosey-Lane and Mike Macellaio, along with the Chicago Building and Construction Trades, have done to build the Democratic Party, elect Democratic candidates, and support policies that help working people. Policies like the Workers' Rights Amendment, CEJA, and paid sick leave."

**[RSVP NOW to make sure you get your ticket to join us in honoring these two incredible leaders.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/LHP9JUP9JG5nkRaNTun3-eWfxNs44p7VBtCDBch38-0=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_L2)**
[**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bAYicenal676RZoo7MApWSJrpkGgUdvNYwW-oBxB8q8=/LHP9JUP9JG5nkRaNTun3-eWfxNs44p7VBtCDBch38-0=?refcode=EM_EV_230217PB2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_G_A_B2&amount=5)
Thank you,

Team IDCCA

Hey, Peter — can we be honest with you?

We know that emails like this one might add up in your inbox — we see it in ours, too! We understand that the stream of emails asking for a donation can seem endless, so we wanted to make sure you knew that a real person wrote this email.

**On behalf of Cori Bush and the Collective PAC, we’re reaching out today because the truth is, emails like this one fund a large percentage of our budget to re-elect Cori and other candidates working towards an equitable democracy.**

Last month, we didn’t hit our fundraising goal. And now, we’re having to work extra hard to make up that gap. _That's where you come in, Peter._

Our opponents are already raising millions from corporate PACs and lobbyists to defeat our movement in 2024, so we can’t afford to start this year off financially behind.

We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before. But with so much at stake in these next two years, we're hoping we can count on your support today.

[Will you consider splitting a donation between Cori’s campaign and the Collective PAC today? A donation now will help us get this year back on track to ensure we can put all our energy into fighting for the people. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJTeANXa79EJEjCe3emIQem4mXSux6DUZh1TepnPzKgOGxzTaK7Lrtd9foS8eu1da6rNpPn_UM0yCkj2LB7iOgP5fFLqeXJt530UtWYNPG5nJgvifsFOc3AtZZqv6mx150ahGUbE2AtZNKnk2RTOzZvMfa2rNCW62TwlKb4K_m3-sx6-hBbjsgl5faL8261DrF8LEprAUjsbI_ALcRd7qc4jayx47k-nGmMpT56-Cdblqb3eVlu_-D_Ldo40rcuQ01XyM0-II2oNSbosaNTziPwC1kPiyQbJOPsNuO9uzXmejSjJmD4LnYeDTY6wXzcAIMhQl3x3zEGCoGKSnL_9ydHLeQGC-p7-xkX36q_KWBzhSU7O8_22anRG5XWmFRXHOQ7tnq7mC5-KDiYnfqOm3ZFcW2IpWL4jJBvM8m8y7PA606KNJFmPJcHs_XYz15_nfU/3ts/LqhN6cH6Q6G_fmiRhYX8Xg/h2/YI1OH3FqIs3IUJxOgd8ckUsuW-K7RyxXy9Z0Vd22Jrg) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Cori Bush and The Collective PAC.

To many, 2023 is an ‘off-year’. But Cori has made it abundantly clear that for us — working people and families — we can’t afford to take an off-year.

Not while corporate PACs and lobbyists are already fundraising to take us down next year.

Not while reproductive freedom, Medicare for All, and housing justice are on the line.

And not while right-wing extremists have their eyes on our campaign to see if we have what it takes to re-elect Missouri's first Black Congresswoman.

[Peter, if we're going to re-elect Cori and other folks fighting for a truly equitable democracy, we can't slow down. clean_body: If we're going to re-elect Cori, we can't slow down. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey, Peter — can we be honest with you? We know that emails like this one might add up in your inbox — we see it in ours, too! We understand that the stream of emails asking for a donation can seem endless, so we wanted to make sure you knew that a real person wrote this email. On behalf of Cori Bush and the Collective PAC, we’re reaching out today because the truth is, emails like this one fund a large percentage of our budget to re-elect Cori and other candidates working towards an equitable democracy. Last month, we didn’t hit our fundraising goal. And now, we’re having to work extra hard to make up that gap. That's where you come in, Peter. Our opponents are already raising millions from corporate PACs and lobbyists to defeat our movement in 2024, so we can’t afford to start this year off financially behind. We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before. But with so much at stake in these next two years, we're hoping we can count on your support today. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Cori Bush and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | To many, 2023 is an ‘off-year’. But Cori has made it abundantly clear that for us — working people and families — we can’t afford to take an off-year. Not while corporate PACs and lobbyists are already fundraising to take us down next year. Not while reproductive freedom, Medicare for All, and housing justice are on the line. And not while right-wing extremists have their eyes on our campaign to see if we have what it takes to re-elect Missouri's first Black Congresswoman. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Cori Bush and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Team Cori The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Our Revolution
subject: Bernie is under attack for trying to hold Starbucks accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230215_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1009&akid=4029%2E5885482%2EvvkzmD ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Starbucks founder and CEO Howard Schultz was
personally named in complaints filed by the general counsel of the
National Labor Relations Board for union busting.

After years of posturing as an employee-friendly company, Schultz led
Starbucks’ union busting efforts — closing stores, firing staff supportive
of unionization, withholding pay raises, and even going as far as to hire
notorious former CIA and Pinkerton operatives to disrupt organizing!

Bernie Sanders called on Schultz to testify before the Health, Education
Labor and Pensions Committee in the US Senate. And, now, despite the
likelihood of a legally binding subpoena to answer questions about
Starbucks’ questionable labor practices, Howard Schultz is refusing to
testify.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230215_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1010&akid=4029%2E5885482%2EvvkzmD ]Empathy-free billionaires like Howard Schultz think they’re above the
law, and they’ll use vast resources to try to smear Bernie and avoid
accountability. Can we count on you to have Bernie’s back by pitching in
to help us fight back?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8350?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230215_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1011&akid=4029%2E5885482%2EvvkzmD ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8351?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230215_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1012&akid=4029%2E5885482%2EvvkzmD ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

subject: If 2 Democrats win this top-two primary to fill the vacant seat on the Wisconsin State Supreme Court this Tuesday, we can guarantee that the seat will be filled by a Democrat in the general election and put an end to Republican misrule.
body:
4 days to the primary!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b151c57-812d-4a8d-b109-35644a8550e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, did you get a chance to pitch in to help for this important swing state primary? **_In four days Wisconsin could become a red state for the foreseeable future—a far cry from where it was when Democrats could often count on the state’s electoral votes for the presidency—OR ... we can help rebalance the state judiciary after years of Republican mismanagement._ ** _This coming Tuesday, February 21st, there's a first round of elections for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat_ _\--a top two primary for a seat vacated by a conservative judge_ _. If two Democrats win the primary, we can guarantee that the court adds another jurist who cares about democracy and women’s rights._ [**_Can you click here to join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz._ There’s so much on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc65fda52-6cae-44dd-ab9b-5f15b85f5155/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From our friends at Pod Save America:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0de79b5f-1c73-4a8d-afc9-8e3eae8563a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) As we’ve said before: **_With a right winger leaving Wisconsin's Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat. There'__s an open primary Feb. 21st __with two Democrats and two Republicans_ _. If Dems run first and second, we guarantee a win in April's general election. At the very least, we must stop both Republicans from winning the 21st, shutting us out of the general election._** _Meanwhile, The Wisconsin Democratic Party said recently:_ MAGA Republican-aligned candidate Jennifer Dorow just placed a $60,000 ad buy.

| **_A liberal Supreme Court majority will overturn Wisconsin's radical abortion ban and insane gerrymandering that delivered Kevin McCarthy a House majority. It'll President Biden in 2024 from what Republicans tried in '20 and promised to do again--use state legislatures and courts to steal the election._** [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a690381-b36b-4e87-a8ae-b3fb4719ada3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa1a5882-0a92-4292-8d7b-132ddc5be43f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

Without steady funding, we aren’t able to sustain the on-the-ground resources it takes to stop ongoing voter suppression and gear up for election cycles ahead, where Georgia will once again be a key battleground state. Will you chip in right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58876285/392513489/1376125197?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230217_f_behind_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjE1YjgwZC1mZWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKL6JH6qDEy52Ded6jSiwIGeOVCKSxnih6lgR6lbYg8=) | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58876286/392513490/1376125197?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230217_f_behind_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjE1YjgwZC1mZWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKL6JH6qDEy52Ded6jSiwIGeOVCKSxnih6lgR6lbYg8=)

This February, we’re aiming to reach an ambitious fundraising goal (during the shortest month of the year, no less).
Our team set that ambitious goal for a reason. In order to sustain our voter protection efforts leading up to next year’s presidential election, where Georgia will again be a key battleground state, we need to hit each of our monthly targets every month leading up to this critical race.
Every donation translates to real resources, like phone calls and text messages to reach voters, materials to host volunteer trainings, educational materials to combat disinformation around the voting process, and online ads to raise awareness for upcoming elections.
**That’s why we’re reaching out urgently today. We’re significantly behind on meeting our February goal, and that means we need to pick up the pace in these remaining 12 days of the month. [_Will you rush a donation of $20 or anything you can afford to get us back on track?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58876287/392513491/1376125197?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230217_f_behind_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjE1YjgwZC1mZWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKL6JH6qDEy52Ded6jSiwIGeOVCKSxnih6lgR6lbYg8=)**

clean_body: It’s more important than ever that we continue to boost our resources for the 2024 election today. | | | = | = This February, we’re aiming to reach an ambitious fundraising goal (during the shortest month of the year, no less). Our team set that ambitious goal for a reason. In order to sustain our voter protection efforts leading up to next year’s presidential election, where Georgia will again be a key battleground state, we need to hit each of our monthly targets every month leading up to this critical race. Every donation translates to real resources, like phone calls and text messages to reach voters, materials to host volunteer trainings, educational materials to combat disinformation around the voting process, and online ads to raise awareness for upcoming elections. That’s why we’re reaching out urgently today. We’re significantly behind on meeting our February goal, and that means we need to pick up the pace in these remaining 12 days of the month. = = Thank you for your support! The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:

My Democrat opponent is raking in cash at record speed, and we just _barely_ made our mid-month deadline.
I’m in between meetings, so I’ll make this quick: **the race for 2024 has already started, and it’s HOT.**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18887?t=1001&akid=2987%2E346206%2Ee8pYIf ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18887?t=1002&akid=2987%2E346206%2Ee8pYIf ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $15 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230217-2987-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2987_346206_e8pYIf&akid=2987%2E346206%2Ee8pYIf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2987%2E346206%2Ee8pYIf

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Clarence Thomas Alerts
subject: They called him Uncle Tom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | **We 're speechless...**

**_First:_ **The Left wasted no time attacking Clarence Thomas & started a petition to impeach him that SURGED to over 1.26 MILLION signatures.

**_Then:_ **A Georgia State Senator called him an "Uncle Tom" on the Senate floor.

_**Now:**_ We're asking YOU to stand against this hateful speech being used in our country
---
| | | [STAND WITH JUSTICE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334773:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r "STAND WITH JUSTICE THOMAS")
---
** _This is insane.

In the same breath that he says he doesn't know the origin of "Uncle Tom," he uses it to describe Clarence Thomas for having the audacity to have his own beliefs._

This language has no place in America, and certainly has no place on a Senate floor.**
---
| | | [STAND WITH JUSTICE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334773:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r "STAND WITH JUSTICE THOMAS")
---
This rhetoric will do nothing more than tear us apart, when we need to focus on moving our nation forward.

**[We're calling on every Patriot reading this to sign our emergency petition. Add your name in the next 5 minutes to stand with Justice Thomas.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334773:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r "We’re calling on every Patriot reading this to sign our emergency petition. Add your name in the next 5 minutes to stand with Justice
Thomas.")**
---
| | | [STAND WITH JUSTICE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334773:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r "STAND WITH JUSTICE THOMAS")
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334772:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334772:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62334772:JsgWQWGuN:m:1:3331421248:7CDAF4DA8885F7AAF105708A51762952:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott

name: Goldco
subject: How Americans Are RUINING Retirement
body:
| | | **FROM THE DESK OF BEN STEIN**
---

name: Jim Renacci
subject: REMINDER: Join SOS Ohio, OFAN and OSBCC for a Special Zoom Meeting Tomorrow Morning
body:
We are uniting to Save our Schools
| |
---
Did you know according to at least one study, Ohio schools rank 34th in the nation? Are you tired of hearing about tax-payer funded public schools too often ignoring actual academics like english, math, science and history, and instead focusing on teaching Critical Race Theory, The 1619 Project, gender identity ideology, social emotional learning (SEL) and more? Do you support keeping boys and girls bathrooms for biological boys and girls respectively, as well as maintaining boys and girls sports, as just that, for boys and girls who were born that way?
If your answer is 'Yes' to these questions, then I invite you to learn more about an initiative which will help put sanity back into our schools.
Join SOS Ohio Chairman Jim Renacci and Director Tom Weyand, Ohio Freedom Action Network President Tom Hach and OSBCC Director Jeramiah Sawyer for a very special zoom call as we UNITE to elect good candidates and take back our school districts. This will very informative and is part of our statewide kick off campaign.
Date: Saturday February 18th
Time: 10:00am Zoom Link: [https://us06web.zoom.us/j/89326810960?pwd=MkltT3hxcnhtcHNmMlRXNnpLWkJMdz09](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUNFOwyAU_Rr6toZeGKUPfZjOaYybizHR-NIwYCsb0KalmdvXy2bVxATI5ZxzT-49usxYzhjllJBElWxTKJaYEjAQDFmeTSnOIN1sBKc6F6wAugVKEcUu3RvXaS-kNKlsXFKXGgMuiAS-1YpywTJGc4I5nwIROVCW2LIOoe0RmSFYxDP0mB31Jj03jUuHPiL7eHlBgPEMFwwjsmiPCpH58mDDK6k_pa-DfFi5pX15X_n26e3wuFRnXCBgQ3CV08oMLuq1E8aOYN8MndQR9NJWwrXWbE8jJeNXmJ2P5Pe-k77pq6Y2TeX1sVJDFEsR9F_109j4oH34Np2wxbA-dLDueKQrb81l5H9gbVRcfC4-7gZ7_5x0pWqPxlrTszymubvMe41xHLBE-Q0CuHYBXBMDepotX-rpqZ1Oos1EeHd34eA2vuHU6l_h6JGOKQDK519O8Zfp) If you are intersted in taking back our schools, helping fundraise, helping candidates or running for school board yourself, then you will want to be on this call. body:
Let us be absolutely clear about the implications of the debt ceiling fight and why we’re here.
#
Derek -
Let us be absolutely clear about the implications of the debt ceiling fight and why we’re here.
Republican Speaker Kevin McCarthy made a deal with a number of the far-right traitors and insurrectionists in his party to win power.
Now that deal is going to hurt Veterans in the debt ceiling fight.
We’re talking about gutting survivor benefits for those who had a loved one make the ultimate sacrifice for our country.
We’re talking about benefits like tuition assistance and reimbursements for Veterans.
We’re talking about disability payments for Veterans that are at risk.
So we need your help.
We are going to want to elevate the voice of Veterans in this fight. We’re talking ads, we’re talking social media, we’re talking visits in D.C. But we can’t do it alone. These things cost money. And they are funded by grassroots donations. So please:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to VoteVets today? We will put your donation right to work elevating the voices of Veterans and Military Families in the debt ceiling fight?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230217-1-15&t=1&akid=7359%2E3013755%2E-nA21i)

When I look to the future, I see America strong once more. We’ll end inflation and build an economy that works for all, just like we did in South Carolina. In the America I see, every child gets a world-class education – because every parent gets to pick their child’s school. And no politician will be able to close those schools ever again! In the America I see, police know we have their backs – criminals know we have their number – and our streets will be safe again! In the America I see, we stop the surge of drugs and illegal immigration. In the America I see, everyone has full confidence in our elections. Voter ID will be the law of the land – like I did as governor of South Carolina! The America I see is freer and better for all – because Washington will finally serve the people instead of the political class. Most of all, I see a strong America because I see a proud America. Strong and proud – not weak and woke – that’s the America I see! name: Ashley Barth (Team Gottheimer)
subject: as Josh’s Finance Director…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Hey there,

We’re in for a tough fight in 2024. With the NRCC already funneling thousands of dollars to come after Frontliners like Josh to try and expand their majority, we must start building our resources early.

As Josh’s Finance Director, it’s my job to ensure we organize our funds, and as we look ahead to 2024, ensure our grassroots support is as strong as possible.

Josh is a true leader. He is fighting hard for bipartisan progress, to ensure Jersey Values and the rights of the people of NJ-05 are protected in Congress. However, with the NRCC plotting to unseat Frontliners like Josh, his valued leadership is at stake.

2024 may seem like a ways away, but we are already starting to fall behind on support. If we don’t start picking up our momentum now, we could be in grave danger. So, can Josh count on you to chip in $ right now and ensure he has the resources needed to defend his seat in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jgf-fr-2302?amount=]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jgf-fr-2302?amount=]

NJ-05 and Congress need a leader like Josh. So thank you, for helping him continue to fight the good fight.

Best,

Ashley Barth
Finance Director, Josh for Congress
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: | | | | Battleground Oregon files response to Government Hi Friend, "Battleground Oregon" has filed an election integrity lawsuit that was mocked by the media on the left, and celebrated by people that want one citizen, one vote. Our goal is that the vast majority of voters have confidence in the integrity of elections. Right now this is not the case. 72% of Oregonians polled believe there is significant election fraud. Tune in to this episode of The Good Fight for all the latest details. help us spread the word about. Follow and share the links below with your friends and family. Listen to the Good Fight podcast on: | | | | | | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ The Good Fight P.O. Box 95, Bend, OR 97709

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I explain something?

body:
The Hill has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.
| | |
---
Hi there – Senator Tammy Baldwin here! [**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Maggie Hassan's****.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58858306/392469065/1046716420?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2208-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzM1YTYxZS1kY2FlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JmEgAhjf_NNd9VLfbGeRSpQYy0DZvaiLXrW3cAV2t1E=) But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now.
Wisconsin’s last elections have been decided by the slimmest of margins.
As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than 1%. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.
So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,****_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. **
So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.
We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (_we’ve done it before!_) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking:
**[Can you split a donation of $3 or more between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's? A contribution now pays off big-time for the coming months as we move full steam ahead toward Election Day 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58858307/392469066/1046716420?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2208-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzM1YTYxZS1kY2FlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JmEgAhjf_NNd9VLfbGeRSpQYy0DZvaiLXrW3cAV2t1E=)**

Last year, this report listed NJ-07 as a “tilting republican” race. In 2024? Not only that, but your district is the only onelisted as being in competitive territory. This report can only mean one thing: Tom Kean’s re-election campaign will be an even tougher race than last time. We need to get ahead of this, friend, so we can start tilting the scale and moving the rating back to our side. name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3sfkp0ovk535jmmng46oor2jtn396l2p6bde310_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdhmeor4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ckbatvj6ljutjn6k9fm47a44gvlnq0b2eqkn7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdhmeor4clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4tjq27afkqc8f1cvkmtu6212ok0ib3nic8ka81g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cdhmeor4clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:

I'll be honest with you.

It's time to come clean.

And it's hard for me to say this, but I have to let you know.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

Ron Johnson

My name is Jenn McClellan.

**I am a Black woman, working mom, an 18-year state legislator, and the Democratic nominee for Virginia’s 4th Congressional District.**

Our special election campaign is a chance to make history — _no Black woman has ever represented Virginia in the United States Congress._

As a Black woman, I bring a whole new perspective that has not had a voice in the Virginia delegation. And I’ll be honest with you, that perspective has been long underrepresented in Congress.

When it comes to the issues, from voting to health care access to equality under the law, I will put my experience as a legislator and unique personal perspective to work and get results for you and your family.

[_**With our election days away and early voting already underway, it’s critical that Fourth District voters hear our message. Will you split a $15 donation between our campaign and Fight for Progress at this important moment?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58859905/392474537/1065762261?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230217-1-EM&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyYzI5OWMwLWRmYWUtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KIKVQI9ICIyMqYSrTfQZlwOHWMFrqgT_w8ARAIISIBc=)

clean_body: And so many across the Commonwealth | = My name is Jenn McClellan. I am a Black woman, working mom, an 18-year state legislator, and the Democratic nominee for Virginia’s 4th Congressional District. Our special election campaign is a chance to make history — no Black woman has ever represented Virginia in the United States Congress. As a Black woman, I bring a whole new perspective that has not had a voice in the Virginia delegation. And I’ll be honest with you, that perspective has been long underrepresented in Congress. When it comes to the issues, from voting to health care access to equality under the law, I will put my experience as a legislator and unique personal perspective to work and get results for you and your family. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Your support will make all the difference. Let’s make history together! — Jenn McClellan * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. #### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63eff19e9b1c9c29740ca50a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63efee1dac26827f66c454bf%26ss_email_id%3D63eff19e9b1c9c29740ca50a%26ss_campaign_name%3D400%252B%2BPeople%2BShowed%2BUp%2Bto%2BOur%2BKickoff.%2BYou%2Bcan%2Bwatch%2Bit%2Bon%2Bour%2BFB%2Bpage%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-17T21%253A29%253A13Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63efee1dac26827f66c454bf&l=en-US&s=kAUl6nQbBj_jXEwR7mEWNRVbWno%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63eff19e9b1c9c29740ca50a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63efee1dac26827f66c454bf&l=en-US&s=TJ8-LN6TseM20LR8ze4yaVnJ87U%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**

[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)

---

It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: The military is NO place for woke politics
body:
| | | Peter,
---
When I saw what was being taught at our military academies and training facilities, I was absolutely SHOCKED, Peter.

Critical race theory. Woke gender ideology. Liberal revisionist history.

It sounds like a nightmare - but unfortunately, it’s the truth. The woke Left is poisoning our military, and it’s up to us to stop them.

Peter, when I was training as a Green Beret, I learned many things. Two of the most important were how to take down the enemy and how to support my fellow soldiers.

There is NO reason to turn our soldiers against each other with woke politics, and it MUST stop if we’re going to continue to keep America safe.

[**Stand with me now and keep the woke left OUT of our military!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=fcae03777396446d9abe407a4ed4ac42&_e=4GZ18qd3JtQEqQY39-G4uAeqNKSDRFTRW7p5PLM8M8Gg0tdCEaF-rraKApRBmzKqsX3V8up0Obm22a4sn78pBWLctMJLgoCAXuhCYOuJGN0s64rGJgtwkyDeC0MQ7IjGhSNxgPxo7kMsl553rRbE0nhLcUuPMrwR96vMcQusBHkSNr7kvx8wD3XkuJGP6PCdONVxgWB6345wYx0OlRnUkVi-VzDQuFRdrJbT2YfJSuIzYS6gqn8g9Ty397d5wbt4BPGanelMeLiuhK2TQfiMa3jjPncR84oFSm8JbtCErKDU6KTQupj40lYVCDDcsDH-MaiKzykJxtxdUeL1Yda0YYg74jLkyPErS9LsDZd2DfA%3D)

Peter, the consequences of teaching things like critical race theory in our military are life and death.

Turning our troops against each other based on their gender or the color of their skin erodes the trust that is necessary for keeping America safe.

It’s not just bad policy, Peter: it’s an outright national security risk.

When I was in the battlefield, I couldn't afford to wonder where my fellow soldiers' allegiances were or if I could trust them.

I trusted that we were all in this for one reason: to protect and defend the country we loved.

We should be uniting our troops, not dividing them by race, gender, religion, or any other factor.

**[Stand with me to DEFEND the integrity of our military and keep OUT woke politics.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=fcae03777396446d9abe407a4ed4ac42&_e=4GZ18qd3JtQEqQY39-G4uAeqNKSDRFTRW7p5PLM8M8Gg0tdCEaF-rraKApRBmzKqsX3V8up0Obm22a4sn78pBWLctMJLgoCAXuhCYOuJGN0s64rGJgtwkyDeC0MQ7IjGhSNxgPxo7kMsl553rRbE0nhLcUuPMrwR96vMcQusBHkSNr7kvx8wD3XkuJGP6PCdONVxgWB6345wYx0OlRnUkf0Ohw4uIdufozEqgzbvsubuJjnGFShNgYIH0dYirtGWyL_BHJNdNiTgpJS9t1BJsMx42LiRNEqSGMxOBZ8hUXO9vP6ZmTplP3mTyUZwGwy0hf98XKYqLaxcfCD2VGsAVxz50xYV75EUzxQGonzo45Q%3D) **[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=fcae03777396446d9abe407a4ed4ac42&_e=4GZ18qd3JtQEqQY39-G4uAeqNKSDRFTRW7p5PLM8M8FtTeoKzkxWt8dsr1e113nDiEvxvNAKppL1OS4ERFMf841tu57YLTHjqwkFiNRE5C54vAqgJdJp7WwY5URtOOsQj_ABoWRfYaCkfykNKTS_qjT4J8EnL6arzVtTGz6_1Njmq1zNuC2jAIsBK2-QNn1PJItn6LDL-pMziJgcAMn99H_J4eKVYfOXDJ6lU1vtLXyJey7aiYoon7kd8OQqB4DhiXA0uron4zRZA0JO3Uk7TztkMihFcBKg8C6lJLDs5eBkFqvX-vJ6uygSq6HytuBpgQ6sM66utvV-dx8p7OyeEQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, When I saw what was being taught at our military academies and training facilities, I was absolutely SHOCKED, Peter. Critical race theory. Woke gender ideology. Liberal revisionist history. It sounds like a nightmare - but unfortunately, it’s the truth. The woke Left is poisoning our military, and it’s up to us to stop them. Peter, when I was training as a Green Beret, I learned many things. Two of the most important were how to take down the enemy and how to support my fellow soldiers. There is NO reason to turn our soldiers against each other with woke politics, and it MUST stop if we’re going to continue to keep America safe. Peter, the consequences of teaching things like critical race theory in our military are life and death. Turning our troops against each other based on their gender or the color of their skin erodes the trust that is necessary for keeping America safe. It’s not just bad policy, Peter: it’s an outright national security risk. When I was in the battlefield, I couldn't afford to wonder where my fellow soldiers' allegiances were or if I could trust them. I trusted that we were all in this for one reason: to protect and defend the country we loved. We should be uniting our troops, not dividing them by race, gender, religion, or any other factor. | | De Oppresso Liber, Col. Right-wing justices have agreed to REOPEN two cases with decisions that Republicans in the legislature would like to see reversed. Today marks a deadline for GOP legislators to file additional documents in their suit to allow extreme gerrymandering of legislative districts. If they’re successful, we can be sure the next electoral maps will be rigged against Democratic candidates. = | = Thanks, Team Cooper \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Roy Cooper = Date: February 7, 2023 5:57pm Subject: Peter, I’m furious NC STATE SUPREME COURT BOWS TO POLITICAL PRESSURE Right-wing majority agrees to reopen critical rulings Peter — The new GOP majority of our state Supreme Court just agreed to rehear critical cases decided only months ago under previous justices. The cases in question notably struck down Republicans’ anti-voter legislation and ultra-gerrymandered legislative district maps. It’s an appalling, unprecedented reversal of precedent, and clearly politically motivated. The right-wing Court is bowing to pressure from Republican legislators to undo those decisions — and presumably provide new outcomes more favorable to the GOP. = Peter, the Republican legislature intends to undermine our state constitution and create a judiciary subservient to their political ideology — and their efforts are already paying off. It’s clear that these justices reject the idea of an independent judiciary and swear allegiance to the whims of the Republican legislative leadership. That isn’t how our judicial system is supposed to work, and it’s putting our democracy itself at risk. After the Court issues its rulings, we’ll need to be prepared for the GOP to have a massive advantage in elections to come. We can only take them on if we build up our strength NOW. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = --- = --- = --- = --- = --- Thank you, Roy = **=** --- **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
Good afternoon. We don't just need to build the middle class; we need to save it. | The middle class is being destroyed, and Americans
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OPW87wC/c?w=HO2TeNxhd9SyPYwgtJ3Bdu_wjAxFOKVhzIS820ID_PI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby8zOU9QVzg3d0M_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**

| | The catastrophic destruction of middle-class life in America
---
| | Good afternoon. We don't just need to build the middle class; we need to save it.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OPW87wC/c?w=-KucsozH4nPjf9xcOT7pT_cXQYbZN0D2zJ_YRh_2f28.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjM1NTAxOWQ3LTMxOTEtNDFiYy1iYjJkLTdlZjY3NGRkODk0YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | The middle class is being destroyed, and Americans are working harder but falling further behind. [Support Dr. Bob Lorinser's bid for Congress](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OPW87wC/c?w=0HuhVjzvd6EyGhCOaV-Z7i9MhuSMnqIFcOFWDiHnEMg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2IiLCJyIjoiMDcxMWIzYWYtYjZmNi00ZTEzLTgxZjAtMmJiMTllNjU3Y2UxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) with a donation to the rural fund so he can champion the needs of our workforce in America's heartland.
---
| | | [**GIVE TO DR. BOB'S RURAL FUND**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OPW87wC/c?w=HR3-aNAkcucAkekAZobTE3dtM67ECwD2W3CIFPYt5tE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjY3N2Y1ZDdmLTM5Y2UtNDQyZS05YWI4LTdkZjcxNGJiZGVkMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | WASHINGTON, DC — The [Cost-of-Thriving Index (COTI)](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OPW87wC/c?w=laR-82nb3yjqvS1BC_8ygy5BWOE6u0bxiNNjUVyRTUo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbmNvbXBhc3Mub3JnLzIwMjMtY29zdC1vZi10aHJpdmluZy1pbmRleC8iLCJyIjoiZGEyZjZmZjUtNDAzMi00MDNmLWJlMWItYWQwNGQyMmFiZGZjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) measures the number of weeks a typical worker would need to work annually to earn enough income for major everyday costs, i.e., How much does a family of four in the American middle-class need for food, housing, healthcare, transportation, and higher education. Families who can pay for these needs without worry can enjoy some luxuries without risking their children's future. In 1985, COTI was nearly 40 weeks. In 2022, it was 62 weeks. American Compass, a conservative think tank, created this index. Some methods could have been better, but the results would probably be the same. It advocates for families supporting themselves, contributing to their communities, and preparing the next generation to succeed. The results
* Raising a family on one income is only possible for 50% of the population.
* Two working parents are needed to thrive, but most families prefer having a parent with young children at home.
* Many one-parent families can't make it without public assistance.
* Americans are working longer hours, more than in any other developed country.
* Americans have gone deeply into debt, collectively increasing from $599 billion in December 1985 to $4.8 trillion by December 2022.

Other consequences
* Americans have fewer children and form families later in life.
* Increase reliance on public subsidies, even for the employed.
* Childcare crisis

"I agree with my colleagues across the political spectrum – conservatives and liberals; the economic burdens on the American family threaten our middle class," said Dr. Bob Lorinser, candidate for US Congress in Michigan's First District, one of the Nation's most rural areas. "We must work together to address the pressing issues of rural America. The middle class is being destroyed, and the people of my district are working harder but falling further behind." Lorinser advocates for more support for workers with livable wages to families support themselves, contribute to their communities and prepare the next generation for the same. "Life is unaffordable for far too many families in America's rural heartland, and leaders aren't paying enough attention," said Lorinser. "The government's job is to provide for the general well-being of its citizens. Let's get back to work for the American family. That means the expansion of childcare, education, healthcare, housing, and livable wages."
---

Donald J. Trump February 16th, 2023
The long awaited important sections of the Georgia report, which do not even mention President Trump’s name, have nothing to do with the President because President Trump did absolutely nothing wrong. The President participated in two perfect phone calls regarding election integrity in Georgia, which he is entitled to do - in fact, as President, it was President Trump’s Constitutional duty to ensure election safety, security, and integrity.
