name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: Breaking up 💔 with socialism
body:
It's common for young people to flirt with socialism.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217EgwoRLzDCEB-O1w3nafOhXoAA2dFUlrcRjvIimRiD3EXWe5o0wk9bkxiEO-86z5YqSKUyp9DjTgghPR07JMNg5-ecBKXZcAKuKJe32TCwmmSq18RUlksFH8P7X5Ywul7rkynOLSClyhJhIZZTLYECL7Wz7HV3mwEfZUm3ZxKJbASbsiWBfJhUnvjmapMgu_RFtQ%3D%3D)
Friend,

It's common for young people to flirt with socialism.

But this infatuation can have dangerous consequences for all of us if it goes on too long... unfortunately, that's exactly what's been happening in America.

Luckily, the Dissident Project is here to remove the rose-colored glasses from the eyes of high school students so they can see socialism for the dangerous ideology it truly is.

My name is Daniel Di Martino, and I am the founder of the Dissent Project. We send survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the country to teach students the truth about socialism.

[_**I am humbly asking you to chip in $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217EgwoRLzDCEB-O1w3nafOhXoB7qP9aGlOhmp5r7fbEY_hULiT_Se72_x5V_E1LYrheKtZGFuyDkDBMkO-UfAhskU_8847rlI9LqlpwoAqqIpA3vrohxMi7AeJ0mJQwQ_G5ayYXnoP8g8EktOaXBAwPTeEXLi8LI7RBfruX1bbMChM388Yjm8rZ8NVkCNkBzJnagQ%3D%3D)

The Dissident Project hosts speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Eritrea, and Venezuela with unique stories that high schoolers need to hear.

And our speakers are in high demand!

**Our dissidents have already completed over 20 speeches across the country and are gearing up for a busy spring.**

I've been able to share my experience of fleeing Venezuela's socialist regime and the importance of preserving the liberties we enjoy in the United States with thousands of students this year.

Afterward, students lined up to take photos, and teachers gave me the opportunity to speak to their smaller classrooms as well.

**I even met a student from Venezuela with a similar story which sparked a much-needed conversation about freedom with her classmates.**

February is a new -- and busier -- month, with four upcoming speeches on the books. Your support helps our speakers present their stories at no cost to schools.

**Please support the Dissident Project today by _clicking below_.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217Eg7mtVRSo5PQ4BE5HCva4ew_QYh4Fk6SFOvA_YFaY04hwu-4QN9-YI_6mAECwINLeMzUcxfYWpAT3n9yxNnFxmPwZ9hgSdBxM5M4kgmi7F-awhTkYEnCqzSiTQgLJnTX5jbbnDSNVjs6LmzKMoMbBsk6bntPIV3uloRJKaPPf7lM6TklVi5xS25Pf0w8gYA96FA%3D%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217Eg7mtVRSo5PQ4BE5HCva4ew8QEfunJCYejX5czIvOeASkWRgOcY8tpv9LUtBcEbdl6kkj90BspUBGjPdRDiZJNkPCEf3y6FY5FVdDQYtZJrUUVBKN1LHv4p8YjXyFQ5QBxSe_xoXYMfUl2LBRvd5JBbP0SZOqZz1sNG5fCl_nks_KQCbv0CobyEzxWxrErXwLdw%3D%3D)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217Eg7mtVRSo5PQ4BE5HCva4ew92P_viHNsLBijYOwJXDFN56vYEnXbAeCN4mkLgrq6UBBZ89jQJdCUdsKZoNAUC-H91dL4UlHFJgUgJpxA_mJpnGIg8PrmT1bH2dIBvFiFIK8HKozGbcJNCARcdh8xOv8NdRHfEMosYhli_vYRTZyxTkjeBNGdN_kZU5gTogC9lkQ%3D%3D)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217EgwoRLzDCEB-O1w3nafOhXoDFGtc2gexvAgtQykxD6tEdJnmicEtEIHeax9ylQN2y7P3VOXagUmvV9mMZDJgznAAOraBaq-YDPNG9zzRajk37cSAm7mQzBdo9Sj8Na51z7uWvVfrsr-GPAK9FwmVN9FGZpLl2VfJXbqPhMihDucIusybTrkAkVzd5MpTCRSUOAw%3D%3D)

As long as students hear about how socialism is simply about giving away free things, they will continue to believe that nothing can go wrong if they embrace it.

American students need to understand how dangerous socialism is.

**Your generous donation will help hundreds of high school students get over their interest in socialism and find a new love for freedom.**

[_**Will you help us show high school students why they need to break up with socialism? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8593cacd663743d0bbec71b28b1f0dfd&_e=V9qGhVqdoNRKsALwhKTN44PMSVqyr7ZyeV_nuNlBxNq_MG9KEZQSQ6Tc8_K8xlJhiWA_KGpxPMAY41IF217EgwoRLzDCEB-O1w3nafOhXoBpl8PwvuSkHvnmi_4O0tNMKDV8w4n8tNrjHCJHQjb6n0KTSpAX7Ms54478Ctl79tVYpHvUyc7X0mXx52gVZt7hAZjarZH9f2xRWuGj2Cs5-ASRBGjztOYJuSuUntlyOCmzUnwx4jw89-M71FPMCyOlwu9g__n_u3XPMZbgR9GsKQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: Just a quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

body:

---
Peter, I can’t believe it’s been over two years since my 100-day election legal battle where corrupt Democrat lawyers tried to hand the 2020 election to my opponent. That was an eye-opening experience for me – **it highlighted just how vulnerable the integrity and security of our elections are**. It’s the reason why I launched the Election Integrity Caucus to defend the sanctity of elections and prevent that same shadiness from happening again.
---
| | **Will You D****onate To Defend Our Elections? **
---

name: Shane Cory
subject: Pfizer and Project Veritas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can't say it's surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government. | | | | [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/1/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/pq0hX7dDLoRCvYPSDGjt84Rnw64=309)
---
* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, American Liberty Fund.
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/2/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/aXtvyc9y1HZ1iIBjA7YsdWrQTSE=309).

* * *
| [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/3/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/i5R0qfctR7OVuHjUNUQ4P8rIBVs=309)
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/4/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/k6tc37aZewBh5ECx-l-c3xjyaZQ=309) Dear Patriot,

I'm sure by now you've seen James O'Keefe's investigation that exposed Pfizer for working to create a deadlier variant of COVID19.

Within weeks of James releasing that report, his organization, Project Veritas, is in disarray and James' board of directors has placed him on paid leave.

**It 's no coincidence that this occurred right after they exposed one of the largest industries in the world. These people will CRUSH anyone who stands in their way.**

[**I 'm asking for your help to expose Pfizer's power in politics by funding a series of ads that . . . . TELLS . . . . THE . . .TRUTH.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/5/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/g5o_PqbilmCZBfpxGAAEiqQHygY=309)

[**Please donate today.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/6/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/Q-vKrWnexhOXcFN-692YykNtMWE=309)

I take this very personally. James is a friend and I'm one of the first executive directors of Project Veritas, helping James get the organization off the ground and thriving for seven years.

As a Marine Corps veteran, our motto "Semper Fidelis" - "Always Faithful" will always ring true in my heart when applied to the Corps, my family and my friends.

In politics, there is an infinitesimally small group of men and women who are true believers that fight for Liberty. We're not in it for the money, fame, power, etc. Most of us try and stay under the radar so we can support each other without the distractions of the media or attacks by the Left (they always still come every once in a while).

**We are a small group, and we are family - and always faithful to each other. **

Mess with one of us, **and you mess with all of us.**

Now, my SuperPAC, American Liberty Fund, is jumping into this fight with everything we have.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can't say it's surprising. During the height of the pandemic, Pfizer dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

From town mayors to U.S. Senators, checks were cut from Pfizer to buy their silence as they experimented with their plans that were exposed by James O'Keefe.

And let's not fail to mention Pfizer's hard lobbying to stop what they call "dangerous" drug price controls. What's more dangerous? Stopping a company from ripping off sick people, or charging $225k a year for the blockbuster heart drug Vyndaquel?

What kills more people? That answer is obvious.

[**And we 'll be exposing all of this and the links to our elections with your help.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/7/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/m57w4C_i0VNw0KQMuAPQan5OZWo=309)

I've been in Washington for over 20 years, so not much shocks me these days, but it may surprise you who took Pfizer political cash as they were pushing out their COVID19 vaccines. And that list is one of the only lists in Washington that includes Pelosi, Schumer, Kevin McCarthy and even Rand Paul.

Your local mayor or state Attorney General may even be on the list.

Pfizer owns almost everyone is Washington.

But they don't own you, me, James and fighters like us.

[**Help me take a stand and support our work.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/8/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/bgaXZ-9oqSTTdxTRTGRtHbMQd_Y=309) The sooner we can start, the more impact we can make, and we won't be stopping anytime soon!

With Respect and Gratitude,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

P.S. Since 2016, American Liberty Fund has produced hundreds of ads seen by millions of Americans. We hit hard as we don't owe any industry or politicians any breaks. We help elect FIGHTERS who love Liberty and our nation **. . . and we expose everyone who works against you and your family.[Support us today!](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F2qwtrg7qQTCrGt0wcgdboA%2FdTvufsWB5jnvRVswCeCrzg/9/01000186608eb1c8-13e0f64f-4007-415f-91de-59fae0ffcd0b-000000/sVXvww8nI9Ibdh-td45Grt4FpY8=309)**

P.P.S. Again as a former executive director of Project Veritas, I was with James when it was just a me, him and a few volunteers in a room above a garage. I know James O'Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him **resign in shame.**

Paid for by American Liberty Fund

name: FP Team
subject: Closing the racial wage gap →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
For every $1 a white, non-Hispanic man makes, a Black woman only makes 58 cents on the very same dollar. And that is a statistic we refuse to stand by and ignore while nothing is done in Washington to fix it. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58872490/392497078/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWMzMmZjYi1lZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpY7m6G_T0oNY3Ked-cARcUpdwPc7i6se2CAcPPeEDM=&emci=15c8f406-e8ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=39c32fcb-efae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team — State by state, ballot measure by ballot measure, we’re doing what we can to close the racial wage gap. **For every $1 a white, non-Hispanic man makes, a Black woman only makes 58 cents on the very same dollar.** And that is a statistic we refuse to stand by and ignore while nothing is done in Washington to fix it. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58872491/392497079/-129234111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWMzMmZjYi1lZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpY7m6G_T0oNY3Ked-cARcUpdwPc7i6se2CAcPPeEDM=&emci=15c8f406-e8ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=39c32fcb-efae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) As we continue to celebrate Black History Month, we’re recommitting to our fight to close the racial wage gap _by taking action._ The federal minimum wage hasn’t increased since 2009, so we’ve been fighting alongside voters all across the country to raise wages for everyone. _No one_ should have to work multiple minimum wage jobs just to make ends meet for their families and we’ll continue our fight for social and economic fairness at the ballot box to make that happen. [_**If you’re with us in the fight to bring higher wages to America’s workers — especially women of color — add your name to our petition now so that we know we have your backing!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58872492/392497080/681487715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWMzMmZjYi1lZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpY7m6G_T0oNY3Ked-cARcUpdwPc7i6se2CAcPPeEDM=&emci=15c8f406-e8ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=39c32fcb-efae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58872493/392497081/681487715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWMzMmZjYi1lZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpY7m6G_T0oNY3Ked-cARcUpdwPc7i6se2CAcPPeEDM=&emci=15c8f406-e8ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=39c32fcb-efae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Thanks for taking action, friend. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Week 6: What Happened this Week in the General Assembly?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
From the Desk of Senator Chase
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QuvCr_EByZfBZ9sPJerRtV6vgWB16tuHYT1rwgkya2FulNAK9Xf7Qg60pebWSoWsEfTlPgBXOli3uuAB5sklt_78NWCna_em0e_lrAczTi1bDpapgxPy89VeZon-bjv9kPD--871ABERrw2kl_veTBbTM4RMSY76j6HyUR--ZcM=&c=ggzaChS6yGbIpNt3AfdkS1lkVfINMAXOblOLKkG6G5f7jHVbTO9cRQ==&ch=g0p1akxtcBlpx5FbHi3JpRm-z_D8CxjeshXH3xun10LeBLO5AAynuQ==)
---
| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Session Newsletter Week 6 of 7
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK?
---
| WEEK 6: GENERAL ASSEMBLY UPDATE
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979.
She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| THE FINAL STRETCH- ONLY ONE MORE WEEK
---
| 2023 SESSION WEEK 6 OVERVIEW

Dear Friends, Things are finally beginning to slow down now that crossover is behind us. Crossover is when the bills that passed the House come to the Senate and vice versa.
Up until crossover we are literally working around the clock either preparing talking points and lining up subject matter experts to speak on bills, or doing regular press interviews to convey those bill ideas to the public.
Now we are simply listening to House bills that mostly have unanimous consent and sending bills to conference committee where conferees from both the House and the Senate work together to finalize the bill language. On average now, we vote up or down on about 40 uncontested bills and 10 contested bills each day. Next week, we will hear those conference reports and vote up or down on any remaining bills.
To give you an idea, almost 600 bills in the House and over 500 in the Senate advanced, and only one bill passed both chambers by Feb. 7. Few good bills passed and those that did aren't exciting.
With only a handful of exceptions, meaningful bills died and only more technical or clerical in nature survived. Bills important to constituents all failed, like election integrity, pushing back against Covid mask and vaccine mandates, restoring 2A rights taken in 2020, parental rights in education and decoupling ourselves with a law passed by Democrats in 2020 to tie Virginia's vehicle emissions standard to California all failed.
The only good news of the week is that we agreed to pass legislation that prohibits countries who are hostile to the United States from purchasing land in Virginia thanks to Republicans and 3 Democrat Senators Joe Morrisey, John Bell and David Marsden who understand the importance of national security. Next week is our final week and we finish up on Saturday.
The session is slated to adjourn on Feb. 25 and reconvene for unfinished business will be on April 12. After that, election season begins in earnest. All 140 General Assembly seats will be up for grabs in November.
We're all up for re-election. That's 140 seats. 100 in the House and 40 in the Senate. All seats are in newly drawn districts in which many incumbent senators will actually face off against fellow incumbents or face retirement.
While I'm thankful that I'm the only incumbent with an address in Senate District 12, both of my opponents Tina Ramirez and Glenn Sturtevant are not explaining to voters that they are running against one of the most conservative Republicans in the Virginia Senate. While I believe the seat belongs to the people, not politicians; it is important that we spend our resources against Democrats, not incumbent Republicans who have not only a proven voting record but a history of securing not just Republican primaries, but winning re-election in a general election, not just once but twice.
Did the lines change? Yes. And now more of Northern Chesterfield is in the district, which helps. My husband and I both grew up on Bon Air just blocks away from each other and still have family in this area to this day. Although my husband and I are 4 years apart in age, we both attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. We both worked at the Chick-Fil-A at Cloverleaf Mall in the 80s as teenagers, which is where we met.
My husband and I were married at Bon Air United Methodist Church over 30 years ago, which is the same church in which my husband's parents were married in 1963 and his grandparents were married in prior to that. We have deep roots in Bon Air. It was also my father who helped with the engineering of the new edition to the church decades later.
This week we were honored to have Pastor Mike Mayton of Bon Air United Methodist Church pray over the Senate. It was great talking with him and reminiscing about our shared connections at BAUMC. I'm really looking forward to representing Bon Air, my home where I spend most of my childhood and met my husband.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| A Candid Conversation with Delegate Marie March and Senator Chase
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QuvCr_EByZfBZ9sPJerRtV6vgWB16tuHYT1rwgkya2FulNAK9Xf7QgKSBhbzTk25Rn6uvq2B-ELAT6qM19a5LfaDGLfgH61p1U-NE1tv_Q4rzmLi04jIcJhWkOwPDmtQGf8nFNApIzXMEFpmxY80MQ==&c=ggzaChS6yGbIpNt3AfdkS1lkVfINMAXOblOLKkG6G5f7jHVbTO9cRQ==&ch=g0p1akxtcBlpx5FbHi3JpRm-z_D8CxjeshXH3xun10LeBLO5AAynuQ==)

| VISITORS WHO STOPPED BY THE CAPITOL
---
| | | I had the pleasure of introducing a great family from my district in the Senate today. Mr. Christian Gutierrez, his wife, Laura, and their family, Christina Rose, Samuel, and their youngest daughter Mia.
Mr. Gutierrez moved to the United States in 2001 and has worked to become a US citizen, a business owner in Virginia, and is one of my constituents in Chesterfield.
He operates his own business, called Dreambuilders of Virginia, LLC and he and Laura additionally run an Air B&B. Mr. Gutierrez received his U.S. citizenship in March of 2022.
---
|

This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election.
Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month.
We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com.

---
| At the Inauguration of the Governor, Tina Ramirez had no idea my aide was sitting right behind her and overheard her conversation.
I was dumbfounded at the tall tales she told to those who were sitting near her. Maybe it's because she knows she doesn't have a record to stand on so she has to tell a tall tale.
This section is dedicated to setting the record straight. Welcome to the first edition of Tina's Tall Tales.
---
|
---
| For the first time ever, Tina announces this week that she's a teacher.
We'd like to know where she taught and when. Or is she simply telling another tale?

If you'd like to stop by the General Assembly, I encourage you to reach out to my office below. We'd love to have you. If you call in advance we will do our best to find a time that I can personally meet with you.
Also, if you'd like to help out, we're looking for people to collect signatures so that I can get my name on the ballot. I need 250 signatures. If you're interested, please reach out to Debbie at 804 393 2715.
We hope to see you soon!

clean_body: From the Desk of Senator Chase | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Session Newsletter Week 6 of 7 | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK? | WEEK 6: GENERAL ASSEMBLY UPDATE | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979. She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | THE FINAL STRETCH- ONLY ONE MORE WEEK | 2023 SESSION WEEK 6 OVERVIEW Dear Friends, Things are finally beginning to slow down now that crossover is behind us. Crossover is when the bills that passed the House come to the Senate and vice versa. Up until crossover we are literally working around the clock either preparing talking points and lining up subject matter experts to speak on bills, or doing regular press interviews to convey those bill ideas to the public. Now we are simply listening to House bills that mostly have unanimous consent and sending bills to conference committee where conferees from both the House and the Senate work together to finalize the bill language. On average now, we vote up or down on about 40 uncontested bills and 10 contested bills each day. Next week, we will hear those conference reports and vote up or down on any remaining bills. To give you an idea, almost 600 bills in the House and over 500 in the Senate advanced, and only one bill passed both chambers by Feb. 7. Few good bills passed and those that did aren't exciting. With only a handful of exceptions, meaningful bills died and only more technical or clerical in nature survived. Bills important to constituents all failed, like election integrity, pushing back against Covid mask and vaccine mandates, restoring 2A rights taken in 2020, parental rights in education and decoupling ourselves with a law passed by Democrats in 2020 to tie Virginia's vehicle emissions standard to California all failed. The only good news of the week is that we agreed to pass legislation that prohibits countries who are hostile to the United States from purchasing land in Virginia thanks to Republicans and 3 Democrat Senators Joe Morrisey, John Bell and David Marsden who understand the importance of national security. Next week is our final week and we finish up on Saturday. The session is slated to adjourn on Feb. 25 and reconvene for unfinished business will be on April 12. After that, election season begins in earnest. All 140 General Assembly seats will be up for grabs in November. We're all up for re-election. That's 140 seats. 100 in the House and 40 in the Senate. All seats are in newly drawn districts in which many incumbent senators will actually face off against fellow incumbents or face retirement. While I'm thankful that I'm the only incumbent with an address in Senate District 12, both of my opponents Tina Ramirez and Glenn Sturtevant are not explaining to voters that they are running against one of the most conservative Republicans in the Virginia Senate. While I believe the seat belongs to the people, not politicians; it is important that we spend our resources against Democrats, not incumbent Republicans who have not only a proven voting record but a history of securing not just Republican primaries, but winning re-election in a general election, not just once but twice. Did the lines change? Yes. And now more of Northern Chesterfield is in the district, which helps. My husband and I both grew up on Bon Air just blocks away from each other and still have family in this area to this day. Although my husband and I are 4 years apart in age, we both attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. We both worked at the Chick-Fil-A at Cloverleaf Mall in the 80s as teenagers, which is where we met. My husband and I were married at Bon Air United Methodist Church over 30 years ago, which is the same church in which my husband's parents were married in 1963 and his grandparents were married in prior to that. We have deep roots in Bon Air. It was also my father who helped with the engineering of the new edition to the church decades later. This week we were honored to have Pastor Mike Mayton of Bon Air United Methodist Church pray over the Senate. It was great talking with him and reminiscing about our shared connections at BAUMC. I'm really looking forward to representing Bon Air, my home where I spend most of my childhood and met my husband. | | | | | | | A Candid Conversation with Delegate Marie March and Senator Chase | == | VISITORS WHO STOPPED BY THE CAPITOL | | | I had the pleasure of introducing a great family from my district in the Senate today. Mr. Christian Gutierrez, his wife, Laura, and their family, Christina Rose, Samuel, and their youngest daughter Mia. Mr. Gutierrez moved to the United States in 2001 and has worked to become a US citizen, a business owner in Virginia, and is one of my constituents in Chesterfield. He operates his own business, called Dreambuilders of Virginia, LLC and he and Laura additionally run an Air B&B. Mr. Gutierrez received his U.S. citizenship in March of 2022. | | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map for each precinct within the district. | | | | == | Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot | == | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com. | DO YOU HAVE A GOOD SIGN LOCATION? | | Mike and I are putting up 4 by 8s across Senate District 12 which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights and will continue until all of our 4 by 8s have been placed. Please reach out to Mike if you have a good 4 by 8 location on a main road or want to help put up 4 by 8s at mike@chaseforva.com. Thanks to all who've already provided such great locations on main thoroughfares throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. The primary is Tuesday, June 20. YARD SIGNS AVAILABLE FOR PICKUP: Yard signs are also available for pick up at these location during their business hours: Bob Moate's Sports Shop 10418 Hull Street Road Midlothian, VA 23112 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30-6pm Friday 9-7pm Saturday 8-5pm Sunday 8-4pm Dance's Sporting Goods 570 Southpark Blvd Colonial Heights, VA 23834 Hours: Weekdays 8am to 6pm Saturday 10-4pm Sunday 12-4pm If you'd like to add your business as a pick up location, please reach out to Mike at mike@chaseforva.com | ENDORSEMENTS | President Donald J Trump Congressman Bob Good Former Congressman Dave Brat Bishop EW Jackson Delegate John McGuire Colonial Heights City Council John Wood Colonial Heights City Council Dr. Laura Poe Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker Arizona Senator Sonny Borrelli Pennsylvania Senator and Republican Nominee for Governor Doug Mastriano Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder Former Chesterfield Commonwealth's Attorney Billy Davenport Dick Heller | SETTING THE RECORD STRAIGHT Desperate Tina Ramirez There she goes again... | At the Inauguration of the Governor, Tina Ramirez had no idea my aide was sitting right behind her and overheard her conversation. I was dumbfounded at the tall tales she told to those who were sitting near her. Maybe it's because she knows she doesn't have a record to stand on so she has to tell a tall tale. This section is dedicated to setting the record straight. Welcome to the first edition of Tina's Tall Tales. | | For the first time ever, Tina announces this week that she's a teacher. We'd like to know where she taught and when. Or is she simply telling another tale? | You are invited to come to the Capitol | There are links at the bottom of the newsletter that will help you follow various bills, legislators, committees and how to reach my office. If you'd like to stop by the General Assembly, I encourage you to reach out to my office below. We'd love to have you. If you call in advance we will do our best to find a time that I can personally meet with you. Also, if you'd like to help out, we're looking for people to collect signatures so that I can get my name on the ballot. I need 250 signatures. If you're interested, please reach out to Debbie at 804 393 2715. We hope to see you soon! | SAVE THE DATE | TOMMOROW SATURDAY 2/18/23 | | | FEBRUARY 25 | | MARCH 6 | Legislative Update for the 2023 Session | | MARCH 9 | Senate District 12 Candidate Debate | | MARCH 20 AT NOON | | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. You will want to turn in your notarized forms well before this date, as this is the date we must turn all forms into the chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com if you have questions or call our campaign cell at 804 380 0009. | MARCH 31 | | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: BREAKING: re: new NRSC attacks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Friend,
Just hours ago new attack ads launched against me, courtesy of Mitch McConnell and National Republicans.
We have absolutely no time to waste -- if you can, please chip in right away to help us push back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230217]
If it wasn't already, it's now abundantly clear that we are among Republicans’ top targets this cycle and this is shaping up to be the toughest challenge I've faced.
But we expected this to happen. As one of only three Senate Democrats representing states Trump won in 2020, and with multiple Republicans already thinking about jumping in this race, we have a huge political target on our backs right now.
Any contribution -- no matter how big or small -- will be important in this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230217]
In the 2022 cycle, Mitch McConnell and National Republicans spent over a quarter of a billion dollars , the vast majority of it went towards attacking Democrats like me. It is clear that they will do anything, and spend whatever it takes, to take control of the United States Senate.
The only thing stopping them from seizing control and translating their right-wing agenda into legislation that becomes law? You, me, and our entire progressive coalition.
I'm up to the challenge -- are you? Please rush in our 2022 average online contribution of $24.74 right away - every single dollar makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230217]
I'm simultaneously amazed and incredibly grateful for the level of grassroots support our campaign receives each and every day. I know it's still early, but the attacks are coming earlier than ever before. It is crucial that we keep our grassroots fundraising momentum growing.
Together, we can do this.
-Sherrod

clean_body: | Peter, We face many challenges in California’s new 19th Congressional District, including the recovery efforts for the recent storms, high cost of living, and lack of affordable housing. Please know that I hear your concerns on these issues. Because of what I know about the people of the new 19th District, I am more hopeful than ever that our shared senses of community and values will help get us where we need to be. In order to continue the important work of representing your needs in Congress, I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = = = = = = The sooner I hit this goal, the sooner I can stop fundraising this month and get back to focusing entirely on what matters most — fighting for our community. Thank you, Jimmy If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

| Team,

It’s hard to keep up with Kari Lake’s latest ambitions.

When she’s not spreading lies about the 2022 election, she’s acting like a presidential contender by traveling to Iowa. Or she’s flirting with the idea of running for Senate in 2024.

Regardless of her next step, we’re not sleeping on a Kari Lake candidacy. **We worked hard to defeat her last year, and we’re going to work just as hard to make sure if her name is on the ballot in 2024, she doesn’t win then either.**

Whether it’s defeating Kari Lake as a vice presidential candidate, a Senate candidate, or something else – __we need to make sure two Democrats represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate in January 2025, and we need to keep Arizona blue when it comes to the presidency.__

Lake has already raised more than $2 million from her election lies these past few months. Every week we wait gives her a larger advantage in whatever race she decides to run in.

**[Team, we can’t wait any longer or let Lake build up any more of an advantage. clean_body: | | | Help us stop Kari Lake. | | | Team, It’s hard to keep up with Kari Lake’s latest ambitions. When she’s not spreading lies about the 2022 election, she’s acting like a presidential contender by traveling to Iowa. Or she’s flirting with the idea of running for Senate in 2024. Regardless of her next step, we’re not sleeping on a Kari Lake candidacy. We worked hard to defeat her last year, and we’re going to work just as hard to make sure if her name is on the ballot in 2024, she doesn’t win then either. Whether it’s defeating Kari Lake as a vice presidential candidate, a Senate candidate, or something else – we need to make sure two Democrats represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate in January 2025, and we need to keep Arizona blue when it comes to the presidency. Lake has already raised more than $2 million from her election lies these past few months. Every week we wait gives her a larger advantage in whatever race she decides to run in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We have to make sure Kari Lake never represents Arizona, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: | We wanted you to hear it from us first, Peter: Moments ago, Senate Republicans launched an attack ad severely misrepresenting Tammy’s record. We’ve said it once and we’ll say it again, Republicans and their right-wing allies will throw everything they’ve got at us to flip Wisconsin and reclaim the Senate majority. It’s going to take all of us to fend off their attacks and set the record straight so Tammy can continue fighting for families in Wisconsin and across the country. That’s why we’re reaching out to ask: Peter, if you’re able, rush a donation now so we can fight back against these baseless attacks and protect this seat. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Republicans might think that their attacks make us vulnerable, but every time we’ve turned to this team, you’ve stepped up and helped us fight back. Together, we can respond to these attacks and protect Tammy’s seat in 2024. Thanks for your support, Team Baldwin PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Re: Tomorrow at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
our message yesterday? If you can spare two minutes of your time, I want
to explain why this moment is so important to us.

At JD, we take our mission seriously, because what could be more important
than fighting for the transformative policies that will change lives for
generations to come? We will be here every day to demand Medicare for All,
a Green New Deal, an end to the corrupting influence of corporate money in
politics, and more.

We can only make that vision a reality if we can sustain and fund our work
year-round — that’s why we set goals like this one, to make sure we meet
the baseline benchmarks in our budget. Our $10,000 goal is critical to
ensuring our finances — and therefore all of our work — stay stable.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127760?refcode=em20230217-27585&t=1001&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]I’m hoping you’ll agree with us about the urgency of this moment and
chip in $3 (or whatever you can afford) to Justice
Democrats. Will you help us reach our $10,000 goal by midnight tomorrow?

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: JusticeDemocrats.com [us@justicedemocrats.com]
Date: Thursday, Feb 16, 2023
Subject: Tomorrow at midnight
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]

Peter,

We’ll keep this quick: tomorrow at midnight, our mid-month deadline will
run out, and we’ll know whether we reached our critical fundraising
target. If we can raise our goal of $10,000 more by then, we’ll stay on
track for our budget. If not, we’ll fall behind. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127760?refcode=em20230217-27585&t=1002&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]Chip in
$3 right now to help JD reach our $10,000 goal >>

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127760?refcode=em20230217-27585&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]Contribute $3

Everything we do — from cutting-edge political research on districts and
incumbents, to recruiting revolutionary progressive leaders to run for
office, to supporting their insurgent campaigns from start to finish, to
helping our victorious candidates transition to their new seats in
Congress — it all comes down to the resources we fundraise from our own
grassroots base.

Support from committed people like you, all over the country, powers our
work and allows us to build a better future for our communities cycle
after cycle. None of this could happen without you, which is why we’re
coming to you first with our urgent ask.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127760?refcode=em20230217-27585&t=1004&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]If you can chip in $5, $10, or more, your donation will get us that
much closer to our $10,000 goal so we can stay in this fight for the long
run. Can we count on your contribution by midnight
TOMORROW,
Peter?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127760?refcode=em20230217-27585&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]Contribute $3

Thanks for your support today,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230217-27585-footer&t=1026&refcode2=27585_1203867_AqbhY0&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=27585%2E1203867%2EAqbhY0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Survey attached: Let Greg know what issues matter the most to you and your family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58874732/392505694/461678200?refcode=em_eng_2023.02.17_b1_glfc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY1MTZhNy1mNmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nAMtLCHVjLJDXpCoqmyAqlmOdkxFAZEW5awikiqDsIY=)
---
Friend,

**Southwest Ohioans will _always_ be the heart of our campaign. **

From the campaign trail to the halls of Congress, Greg keeps your voice at the forefront of everything he does. From fighting to lower costs, improve public education, invest in infrastructure, or bring more good-paying jobs to Ohio, Greg will never stop working to _deliver_ on the issues that are most important to you.

[**So to make sure our campaign’s priorities are in line with yours, we would love to know: What issues matter the most to you and your family? name: Andy Kim
subject: Prescription drug costs for seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Last week President Biden shared the outrageous fact that in the United States, we pay more for prescription medication than any other country on earth.

And as I've traveled across the third district, I've heard that firsthand.

I've heard stories from seniors who struggle to afford their prescription medication , and from some who have even resorted to rationing their medication so they could afford groceries.

Rationing their medication.How sad is it that people who work hard have been left to fend for themselves in the world's richest and most powerful nation?

Well, not anymore.

The Inflation Reduction Act capped out-of-pocket prescription drug costs at $2,000 per year, which averages out to about $166 per month. Now seniors won't have to choose which medications they can afford.

I co-wrote and fought hard for this provision, and I'm thrilled to see millions of seniors already benefiting.

To see a problem move from town hall conversations, to the halls of Congress, and into the President's speech is incredible. That's democracy in action.

We need more legislation that makes a tangible difference in the lives of Americans across the country.

And together, I know we can do what we need to so we can make quality healthcare affordable to everyone.

Andy

body:
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=d0ebcc0ce0&e=8095450ef8)
**Top election watchers recognize we really can flip Missouri 's U.S. Senate seat in 2024 -- but only if we start preparing now. [Will you chip in $10 or more today so we'll have the resources to stand up to Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take this seat back for the people?](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=75c7c771ec&e=8095450ef8)**
**[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LUCAS](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=566399a2ad&e=8095450ef8)**

* * *

Peter,
Lucas isn't running for U.S. Senate to make a point. **This is a race he can win.**
In 2018, Missourians elected Democrat Auditor Nicole Galloway statewide by more than a 6% margin -- and that same year, rejected anti-union "Right-to-Work" \+ voted to raise the minimum wage to nearly $5 more than the federal level.
In 2020, voters approved Medicaid expansion through the Affordable Care Act.
And just last year, Missourians legalized recreational marijuana.
Missouri voters know how to take back their power at the ballot box -- and if we start preparing now, we have a real shot to do it again by flipping this U.S. Senate seat and defeating Josh Hawley in 2024. **That 's why we're asking you now:**
**[Can you chip in $10 or more to our grassroots campaign today? Every day and every dollar between now and November 2024 is another opportunity for us to reach voters with Lucas' positive vision for Missouri.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=2bff38f21a&e=8095450ef8)**

name: Republican Roll Call
subject: Are you ready for 2024?

body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | It seems far off, but 2024 is just around the corner.

And if we’re going to pull off a Republican victory, we need to make sure every single conservative is on board.

_That’s why we’re taking a Republican roll call to see if YOU’RE fired up for 2024._

[**Will you vote Republican in 2024?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=18ea9ebdccd341629dc86a6581892973&_e=NNh2X0hOeb1i7fp5iGR-prX_d920CPoFmnjv-803V-Y9e-nY4gTd_Q0Y1tuNLGPFL1kBEiQcnKPOrovVrYdiMOQXXQ0ulsad8L9dMLttlEI8ZPTtfPdeoFfJaeS92CyvFr2gbiBNECpvpZUQtLJBsH-7U1N5uQ2EONLpAvFP1X5i0jel_DDbp3z5VRbbWzx7K_B0HNKHcxOiUgX12Vc3LH7KF7xCGjxuqWH14yB4-ShWFOD3h7nUPDXJL2GlH48b1NS2qdXIOytVGMhOjZuLSu90lAt5rZDhmmHQNCh_cwtvalNWrIVeTmOl-WnI-8kwOhfN9NCO2ceuOvUMRGc4WCO-85MaX_DZKYG7Ke0cTdmjciY-awj3zCS8mdU59dUk)

Because they like to play by their own rules, Republicans sought out a favorable judge, and pushed their maps through anyway. Now, maps will need to be redrawn AGAIN for future elections.

Ohio Republicans have a history of blatantly ignoring any maps created in the public eye. Too many times, they've disregarded the voices of Ohioans who have made it clear they want fair representation and an end to GOP gerrymandering.

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: 2023 Farm Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Read on about how I will get the job done for rural America >>>
| | | _1819 News: “Count on me to be a voice for rural America”_
---
[**READ MY FULL OP-ED**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/f5911be1729377e5/5131f32fccaafafbc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Alabama’s farmers are the beating heart of our largely rural state. I plan on making sure they are given the proper attention and resources needed to keep producing vital food and products to keep us going strong. Our agricultural and farming industry is storied – ranking **second in the country for freshwater fish** , and **third in poultry and peanut production**. It’s clear why Alabama’s farmers are cornerstones in securing America’s wellbeing. If the pandemic has taught us anything, it’s just how fickle and fragile our day-to-day lives can be affected by global supply chains. Our answer to crippling inflation and supply chain crises is found here, at home, in America. This is precisely why I’m focused on getting the 2023 Farm Bill right in the Senate. **[_Read more >>_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/f5911be1729377e5/447e9ce3b27207fcc3d6b838967d376c/33013)** – Coach Tuberville

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: One month ago today:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
One month ago today, I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

Derek, one month ago today, I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

Every day, I'm humbled that the people of Pennsylvania entrusted me with the responsibility to serve them.

I’m inspired by the stories I hear from folks across our Commonwealth.

And I’m energized by the fights that lay ahead – the fight to stand up for what’s right, bring people together, and get real things done for every single one of our families.

**So today, I want to say thank you. I would not be here without your support, and I hope I can count on you as we continue to charge ahead. As we mark this historic milestone, chip in to help Team Shapiro keep fighting for every Pennsylvanian:** | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58875469/392508137/-2084059834?refcode=email_021723_onemonth&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjY5MjA3MC1mYWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrOscGD1sZG6bHR0J6h50VYWJmCUUjAu62gfDYbRnSE=)

Sincerely,

Josh

P.S. I wanted to share the note I sent you on the day I was sworn in. My words are just as true now as they were then, and I’m grateful to be in this fight with you.

\-------- Forwarded Message --------

From: Josh Shapiro
Subject: The honor of a lifetime
Date: January 17, 2023
Derek,

This morning, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as Pennsylvania's 48th Governor.

As I addressed the people of our Commonwealth, I talked about some of the stories I heard as I traveled across Pennsylvania these last two years. Stories of people who inspired me, who taught me. Stories that have driven me to serve.

Stories from people like the grandmom in Lawrence County who told me not to let us go back to what it was like before Roe.

Stories from people like Tim, who did backbreaking work on our roadways, just to have company executives steal his hard-earned benefits.

I’m mindful of the fact that folks shared those stories — thousands of you, all across our Commonwealth — because you believe I can make a difference for you.

Derek, I’m truly humbled that the people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with that responsibility. Not just the responsibility to serve as your 48th Governor, but the responsibility to stand up for what’s right, to bring people together, and to get real things done.

The people have given us a clear mandate. Not just by virtue of the historic number of votes for our campaign, but by the way we all came together — by what that number represents. Democrats, Republicans, Independents, rural, urban, and suburban voters from across the Commonwealth.

You sent a clear message when you came together to resoundingly reject extremism.

Together, hope defeated fear.

Unity triumphed over division.

We proved that we value our freedoms, and we’re willing to do the hard work necessary to protect our fundamental rights.

And so, with my faith firmly rooted in we the people of Pennsylvania, with my heart open to others and my eyes fixed ahead, I am prepared to do my part to move our Commonwealth forward.

Thank you for all the support you’ve provided along the way, my friend. Together, we’re going to build on this historic coalition and get big things done for Pennsylvania.

With gratitude,

Josh Shapiro
_Governor of Pennsylvania_

name: Chris Smalls, President Amazon Labor Union via Working Families Party
subject: Sign our petition: Demand that Amazon recognize the Amazon Labor Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, I’m Chris Smalls, President of the Amazon Labor Union. Last year, our union made history at the JFK8 fulfillment center on Staten Island, when we became the first American Amazon Warehouse to win a union election. We organized for over a year. Amazon spent that year spending more than a million dollars trying to fight our union. They had us arrested for organizing at a bus stop that warehouse workers take to work. We weren’t breaking any law, but the cops arrested us anyway. In truth, Amazon is the one who broke the law during this organizing campaign. We filed over 400 unfair labor practice complaints with the National Labor Relations Board. They did so knowingly, because they know that by the time they’re punished or fined, the organizing campaign is over and they assume that they will have won. We spent 11 months inside, outside the building, at the bus stop, earning the trust of these workers, building relationships, creating GoFundMes for people that were fired — people that were homeless, living in shelters, unable to pay their bills. **We fed people. We built community. And on Staten Island, we won.** That’s the stuff that the press covered. But when the cameras moved on, we’ve still been here. But instead of accepting that we won, Amazon moved on to Phase 2 of their union-busting campaign: Stalling. Instead of coming to the bargaining table, they filed 25 bogus objections with the NLRB, seeking to throw out our ballots or decertify the union election. **Amazon Labor Union has our own Phase 2: that’s where you come in.** **[Will you sign our petition, demanding that Amazon recognize the Amazon Labor Union and sit down and bargain for fair wages, safe working conditions, and benefits we can live on?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmF3qTFieE-7fo3brfdbOjr-6uVCFSGPbOtPJMtvmAviAazKvkcpnug8N97H_QCrlWZYqUEr2yD-BsS4yMcbAlH7hYGTFFkRdsfPRqQSH4VO-38gVv_nqxldSEMz2BkvPtvUtduByXtzgIRm54QDUz9gXnAgMkU2EW1_5zXh2_F8rkPCr1k4pZvxcUwMjsqjrSKekU72VqfhwjnR5gZ59k-or21Yb27__k3BchCSU6KK8vuKs5CymvznQrif7k18bwYMqicP3HGfwnLR9ec4AGA07r_hoOlKvVPijHiPDiNOmp3KWpBRYC9Vq_R71yrLlm4Jmp_BdVCCk9ZAbiDHK__Ima_MttEd030pZMburZL3jdgYbFOOFpaAeBL921UAbosKz8t_huj17u5w85SjDGevDNjPDfdkWzqaX6dS35EY2AKgF3fUdKMxPWid9DlUFSzKYRTYZQBe1mtt2ra8XfLeJkgqY5eKMlBXdjHQPaK-w/3ts/8-vbc1PdQkmXecPhj7j7lA/h0/m_bXCTKQH0nk_3kYPDtnKEX4sDBUkVVelp07begaeIU)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmF3qTFieE-7fo3brfdbOjr-6uVCFSGPbOtPJMtvmAviAazKvkcpnug8N97H_QCrlWZYqUEr2yD-BsS4yMcbAlH7hYGTFFkRdsfPRqQSH4VO-38gVv_nqxldSEMz2BkvPtvUtduByXtzgIRm54QDUz9gXnAgMkU2EW1_5zXh2_F8rkPCr1k4pZvxcUwMjsqjrSKekU72VqfhwjnR5gZ59k-Ty3xfUV47HbmgSvDpUWC2rWn66MamWsFErqCzvOEClIfe_EPjG0o3Hrl9Y2zs7OEx9Iq94YxzxSOqDy3PB3YNzcp1BAUTOYqHNIDWKEVMBbMFuWVac73N5TiAbfE7H2CU7aB1hnbhVORaLwfXobRsc-NO8zPkmmjZbgDhj3e3m9bpHufltZfuJow6sXmvkS-Xc-lHi0v9SBdtpUCk5ZWGyY7SAor_4yTmypo6T2V53sr277nM9EJXYmeTZ7fjLmqeHRTBKrAIZG3h_PTtK0V8w/3ts/8-vbc1PdQkmXecPhj7j7lA/h1/czJ91_KqVCx7S1Dup7Xua3dVJLOPeHirFeEJT0kDwvM)** Remember: Jeff Bezos isn’t the one who packs your packages. name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.
---

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to **STOP** building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force.

| "I prefer dangerous freedom over a peaceful slavery." -Thomas Jefferson
---
| | |
---
| 2023 Session Update Week 6
---
| 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda
---
| The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th, marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
We begin week seven on Monday, the final week of session. Thank you, to my incredible team of staff and volunteers, for helping us to get things done every day for Virginia. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-NW4WH1u3_6ox9Ffi2yI5YoyGgVhqLnWBEhzX7VwKc8R2VCZNtsGXEB_sfUoPc8HuKVnixduR8YJasMk7I5dNe8qvcNtAwHGZ2t6w2f8A5gqQ59keG_MIYs5cjVCKXwXdvd-xhc3FFEqTu99b79NUX4=&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==) for a list of legislation on the agenda, brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia. Please keep in mind, all bills that passed the house must now pass in the Democrat controlled Senate, and then get signed into law by Governor Glenn Youngkin.
---
| Budget
---
|
---
| The biggest thing we are finalizing right now between the House of Delegates and the State Senate is the budget. We all want to live, work, and raise our families in peace. Governor Youngkin wants to give hard working Virginians a tax break; he wants to empower Virginia parents, improve infrastructure, and fully fund our law enforcement. Unfortunately, the Democrat-controlled Senate is killing most of our efforts to improve Virginia. I will keep you posted!
---
| Session Photos
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It was a busy week in the General Assembly. We are working hard to finish up the people's business next week!
---
| Ban Drop Box Bill Killed
---
|
---
| Election Integrity is a real problem. In an effort to help restore voter trust, I have been diligently working to get a bill passed that will eliminate drop boxes, instituted across Virginia during the pandemic. Unfortunately, my bill to remove drop boxes in Virginia was killed this week in the Senate.
---
| Unfortunately, Sage's Law Killed
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-EAkSSIxVrl8GW84mmr3vogL9U_3uQukWT27ibw_9HIYJjd6znzAsNkAOlyqd0l80r1KS3hTycdVyqlgF_C84xGfRmB0YbTTGg==&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==) to watch "Sage's Law" get killed in the Democrat-controlled Senate. [HB 2432](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-N4z08o0VLud_uh8kgpcDtbj_ukxkZNo_lv81CW3JV1RLaZaGBSxvRJrA89kFOYO8bq7-LKhI12AA2K2kgESsUdBeq98UUIU1EGfg7KgZWKEgm3GUQSzbfyX7onCuxADoBLYp9JISYd7gHsWdeRjyQc=&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==), "Sage's Law," a bill I chief co-patroned with Delegate Dave LaRock, was killed in the Senate Education Committee. It would have required any school professional, who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a gender different from the student's biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid Sage's change in gender identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. Sage's Mom gave her heartbreaking testimony.
---
| BDS Bill Killed
---
|
---
| Unfortunately, my bill to fight antisemitism in Virginia HB 1898 was killed in the Senate. The BDS movement is anti-Israel/Jewish people and Virginia tax payer dollars should not support this discrimination. My bill is supported by the following organizations, signed on in support. These organizations represent nearly 200,000 Jewish Virginians:
-Conference of Presidents of major American Jewish organizations -Anti-Defamation League -American Jewish Committee -Jewish Federation of North America -Countering Antisemitism Movement -Stand With Us -Christians United for Israel -United Jewish Federation of Tidewater -Jewish Community Relations Council of Tidewater, Richmond, and Greater Washington -United Jewish Community of the Virginia Peninsula -Conference of Presidents of Jewish Federation -Coalition Against Antisemitism.
---
| Lake Anna Townhall
---
|
---
| We had a wonderful time talking with folks at our Lake Anna town Hall. Thank you for sharing your concerns. It has been an honor representing you in the House of Delegates.
---
|
---
| Fentanyl Bills Killed
---
|
---
| [HB 1642](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-N4z08o0VLudJwvgz61z683PhYFhp53sbggL_wVw_AfQ2I4jgvO0YbDUMlfWdnQlKaQQyi8JaU0FxKJvYa8nmUNgWXdkgDmQS02OccftWTJ6PiQo7lwvh1HiNoFAOEDiv-dFbPQThp3EZwAPNP16MAU=&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==), a bill I chief co-patroned with House Majority Leader Terry Kilgore, to charge Fentanyl drug dealers. The number one killer of Americans, ages 18 to 45, is Fentanyl overdose. This bill would have charged drug dealers with felony homicide if one of their customers has a fatal overdose. Americans are being poisoned. Why do Democrats continue to vote "no" on this measure?
---
| VMI
---
|
---
| The week we met with many students and staff from the Virginia Military Institute. Thank you for sharing your concerns.
---
| The Championship Trophy Retained!
---
|
---
| The House won the Charity Basketball Game again, so we will keep The Championship Trophy! The House also won the competition to raise the most money for [Team Massey Cancer Research](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-P6jgavqdh8ySFCs6Bg758VwWc9EtfGARqla-zGi_8I4S32trBe9jb2Z7fHfw8FzPYkRHTF1ii36lUaGY-MYZ_S-sCS21ZR9fCQDKu4SKzmlIehut1KX-RZuCr787gD-WQjBfp74Uar1vuyEENmhydxO_cy9lFMRlA==&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==).
---
| Valentine's Day
---
|
---
|
---
| I hope you and your friends had a wonderful Valentine's Day. Tracy, Remi, and I had fun decorating our 2nd floor area of the Pocohontas building!
---
| A Throw Back Meme from America Right News
---
|
---
| A Republican who was concerned I would not win re-election with a Trump Flag on my pick up truck said I should remove it. My response, I put two Trump Flags on my pick up truck and went on to have the 2nd biggest win in Virginia next to Delegate Lee Ware who had the largest win!
---
| Lake Anna Harmful Algae Bloom Update
---
|
---
| We are working hard to secure the full $1 million funding in the budget to help fight the Harmful Algae Blooms HAB problem at Lake Anna. I will keep you posted.
---
| A Surprise Visit
---
|
---
| My nephew had a day off from school, so he and my brother paid me a surprise visit, received a history lesson, and received a tour of the Capitol!
---
| Do Not Enter, Or Else!
---
|
---
| One year ago in 2022, I was told I'd better not enter the Senate Democrat Caucus room, or else. But my bill was in conference and time was running out! I had to get the final signatures required, in order to pass my bill to HB 1188, a bill that reduces taxes on veteran retirement pay up to $40k. I entered anyway, joked with them, saying that I was lost, and after some discussion walked out with all required signatures! More success on this in 2023 to be announced soon!
---
| Senate District 10 Update:
---
| We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham High School. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. You and your friends cannot vote unless you complete the delegate form.
Please print the PDF form here [www.john4va.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-KQweXBeJcPJYRof5RiBvmTVld1jSuJnL0WixKD757taeEcAhhLULNunGuaGNVCw63KZqJE9yJbSB3eAY3xlJroydk8efCsaLXF88wPWBekokgaGWvF9LokiJ61VSBCi7CQgLsNcNyGjbgDMqOH0oz0gh_5nehXgnwzh-8q1-9KwBZ_45g-vg7TIs9poKKSt9C9DnZr5aNQn&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==), fill it out, and reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804-588-2646 to turn in your form. ***YOU DO NOT HAVE TO PAY A FEE.***
*Also, please consider printing out extra forms for family members and friends. You can also drop your forms off at one of our meet and greet events.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xF20p_BXH0Jg8W5DBZMmVo_Mhiyz07bXjOQDUzuDPcCTrNOf3w73-KQweXBeJcPJYRof5RiBvmTVld1jSuJnL0WixKD757taeEcAhhLULNunGuaGNVCw63KZqJE9yJbSB3eAY3xlJroydk8efCsaLXF88wPWBekokgaGWvF9LokiJ61VSBCi7CQgLsNcNyGjbgDMqOH0oz0gh_5nehXgnwzh-8q1-9KwBZ_45g-vg7TIs9poKKSt9C9DnZr5aNQn&c=09VwKOAMAOu124JoqFxKBQYdYVKaDCLsb0HyLzU2BACjF0uZ8CjZOw==&ch=7wybcwm9GOgFEd0mKJ5SR4KBeiNGKajxiAQs9BDYiX4dECDXGQNyFQ==)
---
| I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| God Bless America,
---
---
