clean_body: | | | | | | | ** I NEED YOU AND ALL YOUR FRIENDS TO SIGN UP TO BE A DELEGATE FOR MAY 6 CONVENTION == | == | | | | Endorsement List == | | | | See You Tomorrow 11 Stops! | == | Can't wait to see you around the district tomorrow. == for times and locations for your SD 10 county. Please bring friends! | Reminder: I CANNOT ACCEPT DONATIONS UNTIL I GET OUT OF SESSION FEBRUARY 25. It would be an honor to serve you as State Senator District 10. You can access an archive of previous newsletters at the bottom of each newsletter to learn more about me, my voting record, and what I've been up to. Sign up for the newsletter via email at john@mcguireforvirginia.com Please share this newsletter with potential delegates via the following weblink: == | "I prefer dangerous freedom over a peaceful slavery." -Thomas Jefferson | | | | 2023 Session Update Week 6 | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th, marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates. We begin week seven on Monday, the final week of session. Thank you, to my incredible team of staff and volunteers, for helping us to get things done every day for Virginia. == for a list of legislation on the agenda, brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia. Please keep in mind, all bills that passed the house must now pass in the Democrat controlled Senate, and then get signed into law by Governor Glenn Youngkin. | Budget | | The biggest thing we are finalizing right now between the House of Delegates and the State Senate is the budget. We all want to live, work, and raise our families in peace. Governor Youngkin wants to give hard working Virginians a tax break; he wants to empower Virginia parents, improve infrastructure, and fully fund our law enforcement. Unfortunately, the Democrat-controlled Senate is killing most of our efforts to improve Virginia. I will keep you posted! | Session Photos | | | | | | | | | It was a busy week in the General Assembly. We are working hard to finish up the people's business next week! | Ban Drop Box Bill Killed | | Election Integrity is a real problem. In an effort to help restore voter trust, I have been diligently working to get a bill passed that will eliminate drop boxes, instituted across Virginia during the pandemic. Unfortunately, my bill to remove drop boxes in Virginia was killed this week in the Senate. | Unfortunately, Sage's Law Killed | | | | == to watch "Sage's Law" get killed in the Democrat-controlled Senate. ==, "Sage's Law," a bill I chief co-patroned with Delegate Dave LaRock, was killed in the Senate Education Committee. It would have required any school professional, who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a gender different from the student's biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid Sage's change in gender identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. Sage's Mom gave her heartbreaking testimony. | BDS Bill Killed | | Unfortunately, my bill to fight antisemitism in Virginia HB 1898 was killed in the Senate. The BDS movement is anti-Israel/Jewish people and Virginia tax payer dollars should not support this discrimination. My bill is supported by the following organizations, signed on in support. These organizations represent nearly 200,000 Jewish Virginians: -Conference of Presidents of major American Jewish organizations -Anti-Defamation League -American Jewish Committee -Jewish Federation of North America -Countering Antisemitism Movement -Stand With Us -Christians United for Israel -United Jewish Federation of Tidewater -Jewish Community Relations Council of Tidewater, Richmond, and Greater Washington -United Jewish Community of the Virginia Peninsula -Conference of Presidents of Jewish Federation -Coalition Against Antisemitism. | Lake Anna Townhall | | We had a wonderful time talking with folks at our Lake Anna town Hall. Thank you for sharing your concerns. It has been an honor representing you in the House of Delegates. | | Fentanyl Bills Killed | | ==, a bill I chief co-patroned with House Majority Leader Terry Kilgore, to charge Fentanyl drug dealers. The number one killer of Americans, ages 18 to 45, is Fentanyl overdose. This bill would have charged drug dealers with felony homicide if one of their customers has a fatal overdose. Americans are being poisoned. Why do Democrats continue to vote "no" on this measure? | VMI | | The week we met with many students and staff from the Virginia Military Institute. Thank you for sharing your concerns. | The Championship Trophy Retained! | | The House won the Charity Basketball Game again, so we will keep The Championship Trophy! The House also won the competition to raise the most money for ==. | Valentine's Day | | | I hope you and your friends had a wonderful Valentine's Day. Tracy, Remi, and I had fun decorating our 2nd floor area of the Pocohontas building! | A Throw Back Meme from America Right News | | A Republican who was concerned I would not win re-election with a Trump Flag on my pick up truck said I should remove it. My response, I put two Trump Flags on my pick up truck and went on to have the 2nd biggest win in Virginia next to Delegate Lee Ware who had the largest win! | Lake Anna Harmful Algae Bloom Update | | We are working hard to secure the full $1 million funding in the budget to help fight the Harmful Algae Blooms HAB problem at Lake Anna. I will keep you posted. | A Surprise Visit | | My nephew had a day off from school, so he and my brother paid me a surprise visit, received a history lesson, and received a tour of the Capitol! | Do Not Enter, Or Else! | | One year ago in 2022, I was told I'd better not enter the Senate Democrat Caucus room, or else. But my bill was in conference and time was running out! I had to get the final signatures required, in order to pass my bill to HB 1188, a bill that reduces taxes on veteran retirement pay up to $40k. I entered anyway, joked with them, saying that I was lost, and after some discussion walked out with all required signatures! More success on this in 2023 to be announced soon! | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham High School. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. You and your friends cannot vote unless you complete the delegate form. Please print the PDF form here ==, fill it out, and reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804-588-2646 to turn in your form. YOU DO NOT HAVE TO PAY A FEE. Also, please consider printing out extra forms for family members and friends. You can also drop your forms off at one of our meet and greet events. | == | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Week 5 == Week 4 == Week 3 == Week 2 2023 == Week 1 2023 == 2022 Newsletter Links == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: URGENT: It is not too late -- The Biden-Harris administration can still reject the Willow Project
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv. ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcgA-

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9207177&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDQyODg5MQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDQyODg5MQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9207177&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDQyODg5MQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDQyODg5MQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9207177&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDQyODg5MQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDQyODg5MQS2

name: Wheelie, Becca for Congress
subject: Woof woof!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont

subject: Fighting for a better Virginia

body:
| | | |
---
| | | [Donate](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=5f980c3436&e=8787be5d90 "Donate")
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear ,

Last month, I was proud to host my campaign kickoff for the 2023 cycle with **__over 100 amazing supporters and friends.__** Our campaign has already received tremendous support from Moms for Liberty and Yesli Vega, and I look forward to continuing that momentum for the rest of the cycle.
---
|
---
---
| During the kickoff, I signed the Moms for Liberty Pledge, __**honoring the fundamental rights of parents**_._ I also announced that I will be donating my salary as Delegate to non-profits and small businesses in the community. Mom's for Liberty will be the first recipient of this donation!

I pledge to advance policies that strengthen parental involvement and decision-making, increase transparency, defend against government overreach, and secure parental rights at all levels of government.

__**The message is simple:**__ Here in Virginia, parents have the fundamental right to make decisions regarding their child's education. We don’t co-parent with the government.

...but Democrats in Richmond have still not gotten the memo.

Since the day I announced my candidacy for Delegate, I have been working effortlessly to introduce myself to the voters of this district and learn what issues are most important to them.

Time and time again, I am told the same thing, give a voice back to the people of this district.

__**I'm not willing to let woke Democrats tell me how to raise my children. I'm not willing to let them use the school system to push their left-wing agenda.**__

It's time to raise standards in our schools, incentivize our children to learn, get rid of woke ideology, and ensure parents aren’t an afterthought regarding their children's education.

In Richmond, I will shut down the outrageous ideas that Democrat legislators are trying to push on our schools and our parents...

__**...But I need your help to do it.**__

[Can I count on you to contribute just $10, $25, 50, $100 or as much as you are able today to help me go to Richmond and put an end to the radical left's anti-education and anti-parent agenda?](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=5f98a151d9&e=8787be5d90)
---
| [Donate](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=15fa6298c5&e=8787be5d90 "Donate")
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Josh Quill
Republican Candidate
Virginia House of Delegates, District 21
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=2c015d6fab&e=8787be5d90)

**MAGA Republicans in Congress are introducing legislation to ban abortion services from the VA** — a critical lifeline for our veterans.

**Democrats passed the PACT Act** to provide essential care to veterans affected by toxic burn pits. **_Republicans did nothing._**

**Democrats advocated for veterans** exposed to far‐right extremism online. **_Republicans did nothing._**

**Democrats fought to end the deportation** of veterans who served in our military. **_Republicans did nothing._**

[**The pattern is clear, Peter, and now the GOP wants to end veteran access to abortion care. clean_body: The GOP is trying to strip veterans of abortion access | Peter, I’m furious and here’s why: | BREAKING: GOP moving to remove abortion access from U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs MAGA Republicans in Congress are introducing legislation to ban abortion services from the VA — a critical lifeline for our veterans. As Ranking Member of the House Veterans Committee, I’m proud to support our nation’s veterans. But Republicans have shown their true colors... Democrats passed the PACT Act to provide essential care to veterans affected by toxic burn pits. Republicans did nothing. Democrats advocated for veterans exposed to far‐right extremism online. Republicans did nothing. Democrats fought to end the deportation of veterans who served in our military. Republicans did nothing. Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week.

Bauer said the following after its passage out of committee, “The current child seduction statute only applies to childcare workers who are employed by school corporations, charter schools, nonpublic schools or special education cooperatives, and who are in a position of trust or power over a child. **Opportunities with INDems** Operations Coordinator **T** The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Operations Coordinator to help and support our team. In working with the Chair and Executive Director, the Coordinator will oversee the office, run payroll and oversee benefits, oversee IT and office equipment, accounts, and files. They will also be involved in event planning and execution and ensure that the party and its staff and projects all run smoothly. **O** Overall Duties:
* Oversees operations of the office and ensures campaigns and committees have productive workspaces. Manages the relationships with building and parking companies.
* Works on overall organization of filing both physical and digital (recordkeeping) and ensures best practices for IT and security.
* Oversees phone system, internet, printer, and supplies to ensure proper functioning.
* Responsible for onboarding of all new staff and helps current staff navigate any issues with pay, benefits, schedules, etc.
* Point person for health benefits, 401(k), insurance, payroll administrator, reimbursements, travel / logistics, etc.
* Takes the lead on event planning and execution in partnership with the Executive Director and other team members:
* Tours and reviews spaces for events.
* Works with caterers, vendors, and sound and stage consultants.
* Responsible for successful operations with annual dinner, biennial conventions, party retreat, annual holiday party, and other party functions.
* Responsible for establishing coordinated field offices, including securing space, obtaining proper liability insurance, and utilities.

Qualifications: Minimum of at least two (2) years with campaign experience or similar. Experience working in operations or customer service is also preferred.
* Good verbal, written, and analytical skills.
* Experience following and updating budgets.
* Ability to manage several tasks and projects at the same time.
* Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a fast-paced environment.
* Detail oriented and good follow through on tasks.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to interact professionally with staff and external stakeholders and represent the organization with professionalism.
* Ability to maintain a high level of confidentiality.

Salary: Salary is $50,000 per annum. Position includes full medical, dental, and vision insurance benefits, a 401(k) account, and monthly tech stipend. Position is part of the staff union. Application Instructions: Please email your resume and three professional references to jobs@indems.org with “Operations Coordinator” in the subject line. Thank you for your interest in working with IDP.
* * *
## **Executive Director**
The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Executive Director (ED) to lead our team. In partnership with the Chair and State Central Committee, the ED is responsible for deploying the strategy, overall management, and growth of IDP. The ED will be involved in all aspects of the Party’s operations, including but not limited to: election activities, voter protection, fundraising, budgeting, staff recruitment and retention, outreach, and building party infrastructure. General Duties:** **
* Responsible for overall operational efficiency of IDP, including staff and creation and execution of Party strategy.
* Recruits, interviews, hires, and manages IDP and coordinated campaign staff.
* Manages day-to-day work of Communications, Data & Organizing, Operations, and Finance teams.
* Oversees the day-to-day work of outside consultants and vendors.
* Serves as one of the spokespeople for IDP to the media.
* Other responsibilities as required.

Party Affairs
* Coordinates work and materials for the Democratic State Central Committee, District leaders, County leaders, and precinct committeemen and women.
* Keeps up strong relationships with various constituencies and stakeholders around the state, including organized labor, African-American leaders, Latino leaders, LGBTQ Hoosiers, women’s groups, Indiana Young Democrats, and College Democrats.
* Maintains close working relationships with various party partner organizations including, but not limited to: DNC, ASDC, DCCC, DSCC, DGA, and DLCC.
* Builds and nurtures relationships with Democratic candidates, elected officials, Democratic caucuses, and staff members across the state.
* Supports the building, growth, and success of county parties throughout the state.
* Oversees an annual party retreat, annual fundraising dinner, biennial state conventions, and the National Delegate Selection process for the 2024 Democratic convention.

Campaign & Election Activities
* Shares regular organizing, training, coaching, and other resources online and in-person for Party staff, volunteers, and party leadership.
* Works with IDP and Indiana Election Division to ensure the Party is up-to-date on the current and latest rules relating to elections and voting in Indiana.
* Troubleshoots any issues with campaigns or county parties on behalf of IDP to ensure the Party is represented well and that issues are resolved in a timely fashion.** **
* Oversees voter protection in-state and in partnership with DNC guidance.
* Oversees GOTV and Election Day efforts and events for IDP.

Fundraising
* Works with the State Chair to raise money for the party through call time, meetings, events, memberships, online giving, and other income generating streams.
* Partners with the finance team to create a robust apparatus for fundraising and cultivating large and small donors.
* Represents IDP at party, media, or community functions across the state.

Operations & Compliance
* Manages office and ensures campaigns and committees have productive workspaces.
* Keeps an updated and working knowledge of campaign finance, election, and compliance laws and works in concert with the compliance team and legal counsel to ensure all Party activities are consistently compliant.
* Works with the State Chair and Party CPA and Treasurer to implement the budget.

Qualifications: Minimum of at least four (4) years with direct campaign experience. Executive experience working on a coordinated campaign, statewide or Congressional political campaign, or with a state political party preferred.
* Experience managing a growing, diverse, and highly skilled team, with demonstrated ability to achieve high levels of performance and outcomes through guidance and management.
* A reputation for leading with integrity and making decisions with the input of the appropriate stakeholders.
* Experience building, managing, and tracking large budgets.
* Excellent verbal, written, and analytical skills.
* Ability to manage several tasks and projects at the same time.
* Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a fast-paced environment.
* Detail oriented and good follow through on tasks.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to interact professionally with staff and external stakeholders and represent the organization with professionalism.
* Ability to maintain a high level of confidentiality.

Salary:
Salary is generally competitive and commensurate with experience. Position includes full medical, dental, and vision insurance benefits, a 401(k) account, and monthly tech stipend. Application Instructions:
Please email your resume and three professional references to [jobs@indems.org](mailto:jobs@indems.org) with “Executive Director” in the subject line. Thank you for your interest in working with IDP.

Just this past week, the INGOP have voted to with firearms, pushed for Hoosiers to vote by mail, and expanded an unregulated school choice system - even a Republican senator to support public schools. By moving these bills through the statehouse, INDems are demonstrating their commitment to improving the lives of families across the state and building a better Indiana for all. This kind of nepotism erodes trust in government and compromises the ability of public officials to serve Hoosiers transparently and effectively. State Representative Maureen Bauer passed a bill out of the House Courts and Criminal Code committee unanimously this week. All coaches provide care, supervision or instruction to a child within the scope of a professional relationship. This change will ensure all youth athletes receive the same protections, no matter where they choose to play.” now heads to the House floor to be considered. **** NDTC & Indiana Democratic Party Blue Bench Training Join the National Democratic Training Committee & Indiana Democratic Party on Saturday, February 25th from 9-4 pm ET for a free, in-person Blue Bench training. body:
We shouldn’t have to pay to file our taxes.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)
Derek,
We got a kick out of the comment section on a recent TikTok video posted by TurboTax, and we think you might too:
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_free_tax_filing/?source=em20230217-1&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)
These commenters are 100% correct. That’s why Katie introduced a bill last year to create free and easy tax filing tools that any American can use (instead of shelling out for services like TurboTax).
**[We need to show how many Americans support Katie’s bill. Will you add your name to our petition today to show your support for free tax filing for all? We’re hoping to get 10,000 new signatures in the next two hours.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_free_tax_filing/?source=em20230217-1&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)**
**[Sign now ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_free_tax_filing/?amount=5&source=EMAF17_1_IRS_20230217_V1_F&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)**
That’s right, Derek. The IRS already has all of the information it needs to calculate tax liabilities and refunds.
But corporate special interests like TurboTax have lobbied Congress for years to allow them to keep wasting taxpayers’ time and money to line their pockets.
This is why Katie doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—running a grassroots campaign means you know Katie always stands up for what’s right. Her legislation would make federal tax filing free and easy for everyone, including you.
**[Sign your name to support Katie’s bill and send a message to TurboTax and the politicians they lobby: Americans shouldn’t have to PAY to submit their taxes.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_free_tax_filing/?source=em20230217-1&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)**
**[Sign now ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_free_tax_filing/?amount=5&source=EMAF17_1_IRS_20230217_V1_F&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)**
It’s time to save millions of taxpayers time and money by making tax filing free.
Thanks for signing on,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF17_1_IRS_20230217_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=17880_3422442_s_8Jic&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=17880%2E3422442%2Es_8Jic)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Permanently masking our kids?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor
body:
Is this what we asked for? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/masking?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter,

Is masking permanent? Is that what they intended? As I warned last week, our kids seem to be target number 1 for nefarious political agendas. One must ask, when the federal government is targeting our kids STILL with messaging about masking, what is the motive?
[Watch my critical video by clicking the thumbnail below on the issue:](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4485e7c561&e=9828080a05)
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=53d347553b&e=9828080a05 "Conditioning our Kids: PERMANENT Masking!")
---
| By pointing the absurdity of it all out, I've been targeted. Political activists have weaponized the Board of Medical Practice and NOW Keith Ellison is helping. [They seem hellbent on taking my medical license](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=3b9c2ee4f0&e=9828080a05).

I fully intend to livestream all hearings. It's critical that this witch hunt be broadcasted publicly.

[That's why I'm asking you to subscribe to my YouTube channel now.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=3c36669999&e=9828080a05) I want to keep you informed during this process, and I'm not sure how much longer this email provider will allow me to send these types of messages.

Thank you! We need to fight for health freedom and parental rights.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Former Republican Candidate for Governor
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a4bacdd9ec&e=9828080a05)
---

clean_body: Is this what we asked for? | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Is masking permanent? Is that what they intended? As I warned last week, our kids seem to be target number 1 for nefarious political agendas. One must ask, when the federal government is targeting our kids STILL with messaging about masking, what is the motive? | "Conditioning our Kids: PERMANENT Masking!" | By pointing the absurdity of it all out, I've been targeted. Political activists have weaponized the Board of Medical Practice and NOW Keith Ellison is helping. . I fully intend to livestream all hearings. It's critical that this witch hunt be broadcasted publicly. I want to keep you informed during this process, and I'm not sure how much longer this email provider will allow me to send these types of messages. Thank you! We need to fight for health freedom and parental rights. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Former Republican Candidate for Governor Minnesota Family Doctor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor P. O. name: Greg Casar
subject: Abbott’s divisive speech in my district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880750/392528891/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY4YWNiNy0wY2FmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVF2mur_GdCE_xCVdWkuEeLJiQN4A3eol3mH0kIf0iU=&emci=c36dcdb0-0caf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=85f8acb7-0caf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter,
Last night, Gov. Greg Abbott hosted his annual “State of the State” address in San Marcos, right in the heart of my district.
I wish I could say that Greg Abbott used his speech to bring Texans together or addressed the issues Texans in the 35th District care about — but I can’t.
[**I’m going to break down Abbott’s speech and my response below, but first, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help us fight back against the extreme, right-wing agenda Greg Abbott and Texas Republicans are pushing?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880751/392528892/1658871151?refcode=em20230217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY4YWNiNy0wY2FmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVF2mur_GdCE_xCVdWkuEeLJiQN4A3eol3mH0kIf0iU=)
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880752/392528893/1658871151?refcode=em20230217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY4YWNiNy0wY2FmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVF2mur_GdCE_xCVdWkuEeLJiQN4A3eol3mH0kIf0iU=)****
---
Last night, Governor Abbott doubled-down on the extreme, right-wing agenda that we’ve come to expect from him. **Here’s just a snapshot of his speech:**
* He pushed a deeply unpopular, anti-public school agenda that will defund public education.
* He doubled-down on attacking school curriculums, banning books, and putting a gag order on public school teachers.
* He failed to offer any meaningful reforms to fix the broken Texas power grid.
* He fear-mongered about immigrants and the border.
* And he didn’t once mention the mass shooting in Uvalde, the worst school shooting in Texas history.

Greg Abbott isn’t interested in solving the problems working families in Texas care about. He wants to continue to divide us — by race, gender, sexual orientation, immigration status, or income. He wants people to believe you have to be anti-immigrant to be patriotic, or that you have to be cruel to be strong. But he’s wrong.
As I said during the Democratic response to Abbott’s speech, there’s so much we can do to help Texans — expanding health care coverage, raising wages, protecting voting rights, and tackling the climate crisis.
We can show our love of country by being welcoming and inclusive of everybody. We can show our strength through caring for one another. We know this compassionate and thoughtful message is stronger than Abbott’s, we just need to get the word out.
[**Peter, you can help us continue fighting for the people of Texas and push back against the extreme right-wing agenda. clean_body: Peter, Last night, Gov. Greg Abbott hosted his annual “State of the State” address in San Marcos, right in the heart of my district. I wish I could say that Greg Abbott used his speech to bring Texans together or addressed the issues Texans in the 35th District care about — but I can’t. = **= Last night, Governor Abbott doubled-down on the extreme, right-wing agenda that we’ve come to expect from him. Here’s just a snapshot of his speech: He pushed a deeply unpopular, anti-public school agenda that will defund public education. He doubled-down on attacking school curriculums, banning books, and putting a gag order on public school teachers. He failed to offer any meaningful reforms to fix the broken Texas power grid. He fear-mongered about immigrants and the border. And he didn’t once mention the mass shooting in Uvalde, the worst school shooting in Texas history. Greg Abbott isn’t interested in solving the problems working families in Texas care about. He wants to continue to divide us — by race, gender, sexual orientation, immigration status, or income. He wants people to believe you have to be anti-immigrant to be patriotic, or that you have to be cruel to be strong. But he’s wrong. As I said during the Democratic response to Abbott’s speech, there’s so much we can do to help Texans — expanding health care coverage, raising wages, protecting voting rights, and tackling the climate crisis. We can show our love of country by being welcoming and inclusive of everybody. We can show our strength through caring for one another. We know this compassionate and thoughtful message is stronger than Abbott’s, we just need to get the word out. = **= Thank you, Greg Congressman Greg Casar Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

body:
Please join Jennifer to support President Biden's latest call for an assault weapons ban →

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880794/392529192/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTU5OGE5NC0wZGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DBHGX1YkiPa0QGVQsKotLzJGkOgi99BrXQFBgFrPEgk=)

**We should not have to fear weapons of war being used in schools, shopping centers, dance studios, theaters, churches, or other public spaces.**

But for years, too many gutless politicians have carried water for the gun lobby. And the American people have suffered from mass shooting after mass shooting.

In the early weeks of 2023, we've already seen a sharp rise in mass shootings — many of which involved assault weapons. **This has to stop.**

At last week's State of the Union address, President Biden renewed his call for an assault weapons ban. **Jennifer stands with him — and she wants to show pro-NRA members in Congress that opposing an assault weapons ban is a completely unpopular and untenable position.**

[**Please add your name now to help us ban assault weapons. We need at least 7,500 signatures by the end of this weekend.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880795/392529193/-195178123?ms=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTU5OGE5NC0wZGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DBHGX1YkiPa0QGVQsKotLzJGkOgi99BrXQFBgFrPEgk=&emci=9cb0b269-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a1598a94-0daf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880796/392529194/-195178123?ms=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTU5OGE5NC0wZGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DBHGX1YkiPa0QGVQsKotLzJGkOgi99BrXQFBgFrPEgk=&emci=9cb0b269-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a1598a94-0daf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) **We're long past the point of taking "no" for an answer from pro-NRA politicians. Every day we fail to act, more lives are at stake.**

Jennifer's successfully taken on the gun lobby in each one of her elections — in a district that neighbors the NRA's headquarters. She co-sponsored an assault weapons ban in her first weeks as a Congresswoman, and she's fully committed to making President Biden's latest call to action become a reality in the form of signed legislation.

Jennifer won't back down in this fight, but she needs all of our voices behind her. That's why we need as many signatures as possible on our petition.

[**It's time we stopped the bloodshed. Please add your name today to support an assault weapons ban →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58880797/392529195/-195178123?ms=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230217AWB_N_PT_FULL_9_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTU5OGE5NC0wZGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DBHGX1YkiPa0QGVQsKotLzJGkOgi99BrXQFBgFrPEgk=&emci=9cb0b269-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a1598a94-0daf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Team Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Kevin McCarthy is LAUGHING at us right now... We were extremely behind on our mid-month fundraising goal — and now our donations have practically come to a complete stop. Kevin and his MAGA Kronies know that if we don’t have strong February fundraising numbers, he’ll be able to slash Social Security, pass a national abortion ban, cut Medicare programs, and whatever else extremists like Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert made him promise them in exchange for their Speaker votes. THAT’S WHY WE’RE BEGGING YOU, PETER, PLEASE: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | 🚨 THIS SPELLS DISASTER, PETER — if we don’t get back on the right track fast, Democrats may NEVER recover!!! 🚨 With your support, time and time again, we’ve elected Black progressive champions who we know we can count on to fight back against the GOP’s agenda. But NOW:It’s on us to keep critical programs like Social Security and Medicare alive and well. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | –The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Ben Wikler
subject: I’m personally asking for your $15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881296/392531232/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg3OGJkNC0wZWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNVPfL18120kq7rwPcbynQlIpuviChWdcj35QFHHpDA=&emci=60b4a2eb-21ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=32878bd4-0eaf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter, it’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. In a moment, [_**I’m going to ask you to split a $15 donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and our team here in Wisconsin to support our Get out the Vote operation ahead of our critical primary election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881297/392531233/52717194?refcode=20230217.2_BW_2AI&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg3OGJkNC0wZWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNVPfL18120kq7rwPcbynQlIpuviChWdcj35QFHHpDA=) But first, I’d like to explain what’s at stake:

Now that the 2022 midterm election season is over, one of the things I hear most from Democratic supporters is that they’re demoralized.

I often focus on what Democratic activists in Wisconsin and nationwide have accomplished. In 2022, we expanded our Democratic Senate majority and massively outperformed expectations in the U.S. House. **Here in Wisconsin, we elected a Democratic Governor while a Democrat was President for the first time since 1962, and in Georgia, we re-elected Senator Rev. Warnock to a full term in the Senate.**_That’s nothing to scoff at, Peter._

Still, the odds are stacked against us in many places in the country, including Wisconsin and Georgia. I know it can feel disheartening, Peter, but **what if I told you next year we have a real shot to undo the Republican death grip on Wisconsin’s legislature?** _Well, that’s exactly what’s at stake in our Supreme Court of Wisconsin race on April 4, 2023._

Right now, the balance of our Court is 4-3, tilted in the conservatives’ favor, but my team at WisDems has a chance to replace a conservative justice with one who will represent our values, tilting the court into _**our**_ favor.

**We’ve been investing in our organizing and voter protection programs year-round to win in this moment and upend this power structure.** We could have a chance to level the playing field, fix our gerrymandered maps, strike down our 1849 criminal abortion ban, and safeguard democracy nationwide, but we’ll need to tap into the same supporter momentum that allowed us to win this November.

In just a few short days, we’ve got a pivotal primary that will determine whether we’re one step closer to having a pro-democracy judge representing us in Wisconsin’s state Supreme Court or whether we’re shut out of this contest all together.

[_**With so much at stake, I’m counting on supporters like you, Peter, to dig deep and chip in whatever you can afford to ensure we do not get shut out of this pivotal April election. Can you split a donation now between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my team at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin to support our critical work? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881298/392531234/52717194?refcode=20230217.2_BW_2AI&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg3OGJkNC0wZWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNVPfL18120kq7rwPcbynQlIpuviChWdcj35QFHHpDA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_
---
[Donate $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881299/392531235/52717194?express_lane=true&refcode=20230217.2_BW_2AI&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg3OGJkNC0wZWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNVPfL18120kq7rwPcbynQlIpuviChWdcj35QFHHpDA=)

Ben Wikler

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: There’s still time to become a founding donor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
If you haven’t already, I’m hoping you’ll consider becoming a 2023 Founding Donor for our campaign.

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to reach out with an important campaign update. My team and I are already beginning preparations for the 2024 election cycle and [_**we need your support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881330/392531380/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2IyMDI0MTgtMGZhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u54cKwZwvJQ91sMvOG8yIwXYnHupmUasQ5FMp8AdcAs=)

While the election may seem far off, the foundation we build now will have a serious impact on the success of our campaign. There are two things I know for certain: _**races in VA-07 will continue to be close and there’s so much more I plan to accomplish in Congress.**_

So, my team and I are counting on your support to build a powerful, robust, and dynamic campaign so I can continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.

If you haven’t already, I’m hoping you’ll consider becoming a **2023 Founding Donor** for our campaign. You can contribute using this secure link: [_**abigailspanberger.com/FoundingDonor**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881331/392531381/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2IyMDI0MTgtMGZhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u54cKwZwvJQ91sMvOG8yIwXYnHupmUasQ5FMp8AdcAs=)

Grateful for your support,
Abigail

Hi Peter, I’m sure you’re getting ready to log off for the weekend, so I’ll keep this short! Our mid-FEC fundraising deadline expires at midnight and my team tells me that we’re still a little behind on our target. With political pundits naming me one of the most vulnerable Senators on the ballot next year and Republicans already attacking my campaign, it’s really important to me that we hit each and every fundraising goal _(including tonight’s!)_ so that we can make the investments it’ll take to protect this seat. **So Peter, will you chip in a few bucks before you log off today to help us hit this important target? | | **Pointers For Pete Buttigieg 😡**
---
| |
---
It has been over two weeks since the disaster [train derailment](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e65d8e41be0842f896bdb243d4837543&_e=2WRqjJXdLOoCODtpK-V4L-4Yk6v2PAjIcNAIktoXPkMn8wsu9OPVjC9ZJ4N8I4HbHgI7Z9LpwFJVU0DgmddG0cpvno6XinZfh9muvk9Xb5C9_8EaW06izC1rF1Bh6loODPPkSaw7mAjBjw7zW0n2F3s0YsOxj43rRJvsMvLpUxfGjn28jLsH0QL7gRgnA_WzhFKjvH2RbKfsDt_VzudD1D22QeI-dNcVd5wDnTeBLMx8o4IS3lRwzUjJU7m8tVbZJqLI6eaIcmgXibvxJ7DA-mLtm9RPIjrTQIgGVWcm-D8_yn3C-A9Z-lMfHZVjouOqYiRdJDfkPl-eddaqv-hSiA%3D%3D) in East Palestine, Ohio, and serious questions and concerns continue to be dismissed and flat-out [ignored](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e65d8e41be0842f896bdb243d4837543&_e=2WRqjJXdLOoCODtpK-V4L-4Yk6v2PAjIcNAIktoXPkNFXYNsOiPB0bgYB9yxdZgqGWxNn8WiWhT8tWQVn7OV8dXFiHWmNkVJMtx9bw0QukimG5o_2ibgJN4BlxOsZ69eChN9R7VQQz3ZgGRb-9LayZnUHwqZoWdnwGNl5A0nUdTGaQwdZIVfvyKejSJaVxeePMLs2XMNdgunrFnrbuflts5kogw3joji2VoYHBg1ppNbSMm77lyhSEz6HTn-AkhzlDZbtmDnPl-f9lqoRRG01Q%3D%3D) by Biden and his cabinet. When catastrophic events like this occur, Americans should be able to look to their appointed leaders for answers. In this case, the Secretary of Transportation, Pete Buttigieg, should be the one taking [responsibility](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e65d8e41be0842f896bdb243d4837543&_e=2WRqjJXdLOoCODtpK-V4L-4Yk6v2PAjIcNAIktoXPkOptmwoL1LZicVFVGmFfOhDcyQq_HKuwBXh0Tp9stNaIyyttFQVqpB2qovtX_GIS18BU_OucsiYkaQovUmKpD_5RMpqLsk9qcQmm7pWhdxNJUBSO7cAqzw6c0TfOwHpv6a0Ev4KoBKZQxRVBoBG9zgomf1bbymn-HlY2TG33IGot6cRNETcHWs4RTl-fIBOkC9U2bPELPBbQtkGzeq24GfimDNU7415LsT0dEWD7IPhxwqBySFZn9vWfYC_1f4sdMtmzMU5sZV1Fxj2CE_1JuE2_Gy1SdCfgm4kNOhwXzeE3g%3D%3D) and leading the charge toward solving the emergency. But Pete is doing what a lot of Democrats do best—dodging responsibility and [pointing fingers](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e65d8e41be0842f896bdb243d4837543&_e=2WRqjJXdLOoCODtpK-V4L-4Yk6v2PAjIcNAIktoXPkM2p67gNNwb_Mn3lkdXwhNEpxPp5exCfGNHaZScrueQ1aHOjoACvaz4eBklAlj9O9eQRRYJgGSJKKsu_sNGo3wYYojzVngtT5_xwIJg9GNTOPMnQfP5v77FFvvPmyHlH6TW5kpegJTlwtZaj7DsIKbF7Ib2bSvfhCyBy39Dbdtkp9y3bBtopaJKTkGnijdDZ3t8fhIA-zY1rjdjUQbp4sLesZdvbiU1wEEv815NPa7wpLCZCo2GyOSuQskOMxsNRZg%3D) at President Trump. Can you imagine anything more pathetic? Newsflash for Pete: We’re two years into the Biden administration, playing the blame game at this point won’t work anymore. It’s time to put on some big boy pants and saddle up to help the folks of Ohio.

A group of East Tennessee veterans made a return trip to Vietnam, a country they first saw at war six decades ago. Hearing about their journey, I am reminded that the United States of America is the greatest country on earth because of our brave men and women in uniform. These selfless individuals put their lives on the line daily to preserve our liberties. They deserve our thanks and appreciation every single day. We can never forget their sacrifices and courage that have contributed to making the United States of America such a strong beacon of freedom.
A glimpse of their journey back to Vietnam can be seen [here.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e65d8e41be0842f896bdb243d4837543&_e=2WRqjJXdLOoCODtpK-V4LywKnRhZZjsrwMW8EPbVrWI9b651Xq4kkovI8X9-mk8VDMGBl9ISax0OkN5p966c2onNAZkWaMExtfHAaDzNB5e6Qg_uyjQnuZAwl_qA2Jk-MTqdfxBJuFXa5gdgPyhu25ohwLTT4QBrIqRu1bEnoCMRLSMEWNt1LEtmiEYif0bsM_wFJOr_QmK8gFfWlit4AF10LOVd3VlaDIrWacMy5197pfNj_IwA_0zutbSCd9b3mwq0xZrwJCBVNszNkLBEB2KPAqlo2VYO6niLdSHiSBAZbv3a0T4wafMd4f1ux-RB85pZsrzf1ttPk_PVpAjp07Mrtkx8pY-SfR2mKKeGClrU0aqLhTdcEKh5Vqw6hTrH93Xc4FfhsUUBATck7mthcw%3D%3D)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Rick Scott says he’s coming for Medicare and Social Security. While Democrats don’t yet have a nominee to take him on, we can support the nominee fund for the Democratic candidate who runs against him in 2024. We can build up their advantage before what will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country next year.
body:
Anyone but Rick Scott, 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60f54b23-f043-4849-b487-2e014195d31a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Rick Scott already came for Medicare. Now he says he's coming for our Medicare & Social Security._** [**_Donate now: Anyone But Rick Scott For Florida 2024_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ba0d03f-a542-45c0-aff9-564830b1d3fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _There was a lot of booing from Republicans during the State of the Union, when Joe Biden rightfully shared their plans--specifically Rick Scott's plan, which he's discussed, committed to paper and tweeted--to sunset Social Security & Medicare every five years._ ** In Other Words: To End Them. ** **_Scott oversaw the largest case of Medicare fraud in U.S history. When he was CEO of Columbia/HCA hospitals they got a $1.7 billion fine._****_ His company robbed the American people of funding for our healthcare. Then, i_**** _n the civil trial, he took the 5th Amendment a ridiculous 75 times, _****and** _** parlayed his ill-begotten wealth into a political career. **It's stomach-turning._ _**Now Scott wants to take our Social Security & Medicare, using the GOP sunset trick. It's how they make programs disappear they lack the courage to demolish.** __In 1994, to get Republicans to support an assault weapons ban, President Clinton agreed to a 10-year sunset. When 2004 arrived, George W. Bush was President, and this life-saving law just went away. How many have suffered and died because of it?_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T718c9ce3-d65f-4d6b-ad11-7f1f73caa619/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4653410-296f-44eb-bb6c-4dc22e26c53c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Don't let Scott ROB our Social Security & Medicare. He's running for reelection in 2024 and a Democratic fund--a way for you to give NOW to the eventual Democratic nominee--i _s set up to beat him_._** Sure, Florida's become tougher, but Scott's so unlikeable and scandal-tainted, he's only won his statewide races by 1.2%, 1% and .12%. **_He 100% can be beaten, and he must. Because, again, he's coming for our Social Security and Medicare, and he has practice._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to beat scoundrel Rick Scott and stop him from ripping away our Medicare and Social Security?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0cbf8fd-f85c-4be0-ba41-5777839e309e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Blue Amp Action community. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc528981-37b4-4670-a3cd-3330096df9c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Now he says he's coming for our Medicare & Social Security. There was a lot of booing from Republicans during the State of the Union, when Joe Biden rightfully shared their plans--specifically Rick Scott's plan, which he's discussed, committed to paper and tweeted--to sunset Social Security & Medicare every five years. In Other Words: To End Them. Scott oversaw the largest case of Medicare fraud in U.S history. When he was CEO of Columbia/HCA hospitals they got a $1.7 billion fine. His company robbed the American people of funding for our healthcare. Then, i n the civil trial, he took the 5th Amendment a ridiculous 75 times, and parlayed his ill-begotten wealth into a political career. It's stomach-turning. Now Scott wants to take our Social Security & Medicare, using the GOP sunset trick. It's how they make programs disappear they lack the courage to demolish. In 1994, to get Republicans to support an assault weapons ban, President Clinton agreed to a 10-year sunset. When 2004 arrived, George W. Bush was President, and this life-saving law just went away. How many have suffered and died because of it? | | | | | | | | Don't let Scott ROB our Social Security & Medicare. He's running for reelection in 2024 and a Democratic fund--a way for you to give NOW to the eventual Democratic nominee--i s set up to beat him. Sure, Florida's become tougher, but Scott's so unlikeable and scandal-tainted, he's only won his statewide races by 1.2%, 1% and .12%. He 100% can be beaten, and he must. Because, again, he's coming for our Social Security and Medicare, and he has practice. Thank you, Blue Amp Action community. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: ALERT: Conservative news update - Special Edition
body:
>From Democrats in Springfield introducing the Non Citizens Rights Act to a suburban mayor seeking to reclaim his $150,000 salary, the week's news...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/fa707da7c079/alert-conservative-news-update-special-edition?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

GOP Mayor Keith Pekau Compliments Liberal Rep. Marie Newman, an Ally of AOC, Says They Agree Both of Them "Can Do a Better Job" than Casten (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/gop-mayor-keith-pekau-compliments-liberal-rep-marie-newman-an-ally-of-aoc-says-they-agree-both-of-them-can-do-a-better-job-casten.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Former Democratic US Rep. Marie Newman made a lot of acquaintances during her brief time in Congress – especially as a member of the House Progressive Caucus, where she joined her friends US Rep. Pramila Jayapal, D, US Rep. Ilhan Omar, D, US Rep. Rashida Tlaib, D, US Rep. Cori Bush, D and US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D to oppose conservative principles and promote a more liberal and progressive agenda in American politics.

During an Orland Park Village Board meeting in January, Republican Mayor Keith Pekau heaped praise on Newman, even honoring her with a Community Appreciation Award for her assistance in securing $7 million in federal funding for the 143rd expansion project – a project to expand 143rd Street and widen it to five lanes.

But Pekau went a step further during the meeting where he honored Newman, suggesting that,

“There are things we agree on...we both think that we can do a better job than the current 6th District Congressman [ US Rep. Sean Casten].”
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/gop-mayor-keith-pekau-compliments-liberal-rep-marie-newman-an-ally-of-aoc-says-they-agree-both-of-them-can-do-a-better-job-casten.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/gop-mayor-keith-pekau-compliments-liberal-rep-marie-newman-an-ally-of-aoc-says-they-agree-both-of-them-can-do-a-better-job-casten.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Illinois Democrats, Pritzker, Coordinating to Legalize Illegal Immigration with Non Citizens Rights Act (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-democrats-pritzker-coordinating-to-legalize-illegal-immigration-with-non-citizens-rights-act.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a deliberate and calculated move, Illinois Democrats are taking advantage of their supermajority grip in the legislature and have introduced legislation to create and expand the rights of illegal aliens who reside in Illinois.

The Noncitizens Rights Act, which was introduced last Tuesday by Democrat State Sen. Rachel Ventura, is loaded with legislative language that protects illegal immigrants, including restricting law enforcement or an agency from inquiring about a person’s immigration status if they are working with a government agency and would require law enforcement and government offices to post signs that a person will not be asked about their immigration status, among other things.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-democrats-pritzker-coordinating-to-legalize-illegal-immigration-with-non-citizens-rights-act.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-democrats-pritzker-coordinating-to-legalize-illegal-immigration-with-non-citizens-rights-act.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Don Tracy and the IL GOP Turn the Ari Fleischer Luncheon into a Richard Irvin Campaign Reunion, with Irvin Eying a US Senate Run (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-turn-the-ari-fleischer-luncheon-into-a-richard-irvin-campaign-reunion-with-irvin-eying-a-us-senate-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
In what seemed like a Richard Irvin for governor campaign reunion, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy and the IL GOP finance committee welcomed former President George W. Bush press secretary Ari Fleischer for a fundraising event on Tuesday in downtown Chicago.

The host committee included Tracy, Brian Kasal, Lynn O’Brien, Vince Kolber, Richard Porter and Kathy Salvi – but the surprise guest in the room was none other than failed Republican gubernatorial candidate and Aurora Mayor Richard Irvin – the preferred candidate of the IL GOP during the Republican primary.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-turn-the-ari-fleischer-luncheon-into-a-richard-irvin-campaign-reunion-with-irvin-eying-a-us-senate-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-turn-the-ari-fleischer-luncheon-into-a-richard-irvin-campaign-reunion-with-irvin-eying-a-us-senate-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau Honors, Praises Democrat Marie Newman, Who Pushed for Vaccinating Children, During Village Board Meeting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
During the January 16, 2023 Orland Park Village Board Meeting, Republican Mayor Keith Pekau had a special VIP guest in the room – La Grange resident and former Democratic US Rep. Marie Newman, who was in town to receive the Orland Park Community Appreciation Award.

“Congresswoman Newman and I disagree on a lot of things, we certainly disagree on the debt and all that over the last couple of years...”

And while Pekau may disagree with Newman on the debt, as he stated in his opening speech during the Village Board Meeting, Illinois grassroots Republicans will certainly disagree with Newman on a whole lot more than just the debt – including advocating for the masking of and vaccination of adults and children; profiting during the pandemic; and her attacks on conservatives for opposing transgender rights.

But at least Pekau and Newman could set aside time last month and praise each other. In a Facebook post, Newman thanked Pekau for the award, writing,

“Thank you to the Orland Park trustees, Mayor Keith Pekau & village staff for collaborating with my former team and I to bring $7 million to the 143rd expansion project. It was an honor to receive the Community Appreciation Award!”
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Keith Pekau Ran in 2017 on Reducing Part-Time Mayoral Salary from $150k to $40k, Now He Wants It Back After Losing Congressional Race (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/keith-pekau-ran-in-2017-on-reducing-part-time-mayoral-salary-from-150k-to-40k-now-he-wants-it-back-after-losing-congressional-race.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In 2017, Keith Pekau ran for Village President of Orland Park on a single issue (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1SR4iPny-cg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) : reduce the salary from $150,000 to $40,000. And his logic was simple: Orland Park is a council-manager form of government where the Village Board of Trustees employs a full-time Village Manager to handle day-to-day operations, and therefore, there is no legitimate need to pay the head of the Board – the Village President, a six-figure salary.

But once Pekau took office, he continued to collect the
$150,000 salary (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/pekau-take-mayoral-salary-pass-pension?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) annually for four straight years, netting himself $600,000 ($150,000 in each of 2018 (https://www.orlandpark.org/home/showpublisheddocument/1986/637653924538000000?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , 2019 (https://www.orlandpark.org/home/showpublisheddocument/1988/637653924543000000?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , 2020 (https://www.orlandpark.org/home/showpublisheddocument/4642/637810496526530000?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and 2021) as the part-time Village President of Orland Park.

Now in a calculated move, made only after Pekau confirmed that his hand-picked trustees were not going to be challenged in the April 4 elections, did Pekau release his latest surprise – a
referendum (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyFime2PoLw&t=2316s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to convert Orland Park from its council-manager style of government – like the #1 safest city (https://chicago.suntimes.com/news/2023/2/8/23590923/naperville-safest-city-joliet-moneygeek-fbi-crime-data?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in America, Naperville – to a mayor-council style of government like Chicago or Aurora.

In other words, by elevating the Village President position to a full-time, Chicago-style mayor, and at the same time eliminating the need for a full-time Village Manager, Pekau would be set to reclaim his former $150,000 salary, and the pension perks that come with it.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/keith-pekau-ran-in-2017-on-reducing-part-time-mayoral-salary-from-150k-to-40k-now-he-wants-it-back-after-losing-congressional-race.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/keith-pekau-ran-in-2017-on-reducing-part-time-mayoral-salary-from-150k-to-40k-now-he-wants-it-back-after-losing-congressional-race.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eMmUa8s6MTk&t=328s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas discuss how the NFL has become too woke to watch, on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer (Feb. 12, 2023).

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=431fc77971-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_17_09_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-431fc77971-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

| | **Hi Friend:**

It's official: I'm running for re-election for Outagamie County Executive in Northeast Wisconsin. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58881994/392533855/-451691920?refcode=20230217_BC&refcode2=f2607169-13af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjYwNzE2OS0xM2FmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RpZ6C62_tRQ3fyaasMOmK-BBUdp5h-Hin7-Yjbz1LiY=&emci=4a3e24f2-04af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f2607169-13af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15112925) I am honored to have had your support over the years and hope to earn it again.
