name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture."

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f36f595eb0114c7b9ef3ca5768550a62&_e=UDjdGek7lS_-3P5k9HFPShlhLOBEn5TjfET3vKvfiVQTfCE6tNTzWx6DJJ73h4IWL1ZFT9hMWocvuG5-_hed15oyrz2khTFKdHDTQwGEOgEJPbAtU2plITmQXhIVqwB8IP5p7utxHpeQ4cysA9ea5dxxji6TEgBCJQovREFgvIDcbGBXETv6I2gZbduhFU15RqYkRnK7-KrmhPcBj6cZunNwIlvoqSLbsNbWffvvjurTAqXbJbc6zcwWu6jD9RJ88z1XR1EYUHUlS2rHWImTji_4vDI5WQwM1OSQ8L0C-TgnBAXCFUqQIXxQY7DcOKTeAoMIJszL7PMJY2oOBevaYrVDWT0FUv22FlrNrvNfPBqejqCBvEeWbtYHWN15lFRuNhAh-IysVjpadMU0NMms75JwMkB_23Yxq3ALt7PysxQ%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f36f595eb0114c7b9ef3ca5768550a62&_e=UDjdGek7lS_-3P5k9HFPShlhLOBEn5TjfET3vKvfiVQTfCE6tNTzWx6DJJ73h4IWL1ZFT9hMWocvuG5-_hed15oyrz2khTFKdHDTQwGEOgEJPbAtU2plITmQXhIVqwB8IP5p7utxHpeQ4cysA9ea5dxxji6TEgBCJQovREFgvIDcbGBXETv6I2gZbduhFU15RqYkRnK7-KrmhPcBj6cZunNwIlvoqSLbsNbWffvvjurTAqXbJbc6zcwWu6jD9RJ88z1XR1EYUHUlS2rHWImTjnaY7Wd2AE1wBcWId294xPGsDXddXShsB-xsAzBri4uXPtAw-AGURmOFYy3d5hR8qyoGl47N-MGBwmkmZQnEqjhnChYSSxzy4LHQdGlqGes91H1k6M0NX4QMnypxtNI1H0-gatw04dSAY3e3F5GqanU%3D)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f36f595eb0114c7b9ef3ca5768550a62&_e=UDjdGek7lS_-3P5k9HFPShlhLOBEn5TjfET3vKvfiVQTfCE6tNTzWx6DJJ73h4IWL1ZFT9hMWocvuG5-_hed15oyrz2khTFKdHDTQwGEOgEJPbAtU2plITmQXhIVqwB8IP5p7utxHpeQ4cysA9ea5dxxji6TEgBCJQovREFgvIDcbGBXETv6I2gZbduhFU15RqYkRnK7-KrmhPcBj6cZunNwIlvoqSLbsNbWffvvjurTAqXbJbc6zcwWu6jD9RJ88z1XR1EYUHUlS2rHWImTjgH7awDVJz5zn1F2g3Qi9L75GhTeg3w-1hBKBVW0yzzcitQ7PCcYJrN4sNxqY3bVuQAX4yXCQQAULgQQPmO19R27YQ8Y0SnCgC-jmAF6umwWGDDcvFncx_zaPte3LVStkeAwavX7EpUlpbVOHTj-7oo%3D)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 [**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f36f595eb0114c7b9ef3ca5768550a62&_t=PVCHPcmh1pb6ffVp4l0-_XJAgw454uR0pBvmtqsAgs6oegO4za4bZX1feolDPNcKhz6m4i0-3K0EcdmjUAjBAtg-wZj19ErwwCbjZyvZhL2nrx33mCbcC2rmojQ0Y9r8czC4mSVCt20Fc3y_Gj4p2j0ZnxBcQ5MSRCbfjWH8piw%3D)
---

name: Team Beshear
subject: Kelly Craft spotted having dinner with far-right internet celebrity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Why is Kelly Craft dining with a proud misogynist? Peter,

As Andy works to improve Kentucky's education system — advocating for more resources for our kids and their teachers — his opponent is planning on how to dismantle it.

**Billionaire Kelly Craft posted a photo of her having dinner and "discussing education reform in Kentucky" with far-right Canadian influencer and known misogynist Jordan Peterson on Monday.**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58882623/392536012/-500812825?refcode=em23_230217_MM3_fnd_gq_act_jor_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230217_MM3_fnd_gq_act_jor_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmZiNjZjYi0xNmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ivz3BodTn1X8K7aVOYLCugtfUjTB-0VC83YHL5KIfc=)
---
Peterson is most well-known for his support of "enforced monogamy." He claimed feminists have an "unconscious wish for brutal male domination." In short – _he's not the kind of person we want our leaders taking advice from._

So then why is Kelly Craft spending her time dining and talking policy with a proud misogynist like Peterson? And how does engaging with this hateful and inflammatory commentator help our state and our children?

**Craft has no plans to make Kentucky a better place to live. Her ties to a man who thrives off hateful and sexist remarks like Peterson shows her lack of real leadership and integrity. These are not Kentucky values, and we can't afford to have these types of ideas in the governor's office.

[Help Andy continue making progress for Kentucky and keep extremists out of Frankfort. clean_body: Why is Kelly Craft dining with a proud misogynist? Peter, As Andy works to improve Kentucky's education system — advocating for more resources for our kids and their teachers — his opponent is planning on how to dismantle it. Billionaire Kelly Craft posted a photo of her having dinner and "discussing education reform in Kentucky" with far-right Canadian influencer and known misogynist Jordan Peterson on Monday. | = Peterson is most well-known for his support of "enforced monogamy." He claimed feminists have an "unconscious wish for brutal male domination." In short – he's not the kind of person we want our leaders taking advice from. So then why is Kelly Craft spending her time dining and talking policy with a proud misogynist like Peterson? And how does engaging with this hateful and inflammatory commentator help our state and our children? Craft has no plans to make Kentucky a better place to live. Her ties to a man who thrives off hateful and sexist remarks like Peterson shows her lack of real leadership and integrity. These are not Kentucky values, and we can't afford to have these types of ideas in the governor's office. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thanks for your support. Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

| | | **“If the Democrats could have won just five more districts, they would have held the House. And five districts were there to be won—in rural and exurban America.”**

_\- The Progressive_
---
Peter,

In November, Democrats were frustratingly just five seats away from pulling off a shocking upset and protecting the House majority—and rural districts could have made the difference.

[_**We know that in 2024, the path to retaking the House runs through the backroads. And five districts were there to be won—in rural and exurban America.” \- The Progressive Peter, In November, Democrats were frustratingly just five seats away from pulling off a shocking upset and protecting the House majority—and rural districts could have made the difference. = | = Rural areas are imperative to winning the House majority, so we can’t risk ignoring these communities. This is exactly why I founded BACKROADS PAC – to help elect Democrats in rural areas. = | = While we may have lost the House majority in the 2022 midterm elections, we have the opportunity to win it back in 2024, so we’ll be working hard to ensure we can secure wins nationwide. name: Team Cori
subject: Recommendations for Black History Month →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We’re sharing your favorite Black History Month and Black joy related books!
#
Earlier this month, we reached out with a different ask than normal: We wanted to hear about your favorite ways to celebrate Black joy, in honor of Black History Month.
So many members of this movement stepped up to share incredible recommendations, and we wanted to make sure you all got to see their responses, too.
So first up, we’re highlighting just some of the books that members of Team Cori said help them celebrate Black joy and Black history:
📗 _Claudette Colvin: Twice Toward Justice_ by Phillip Hoose, recommended by C in Maryland
📘 _Bitter Root_ by Chuck Brown, David F. Walker, and Sanford Greene, recommended by Kasele in New York
📙 _I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings_ by Maya Angelou, recommended by Linda in Massachusetts
📕 _The Forerunner_ by Cori Bush, recommended by Ashton in Washington
Throughout the rest of the month, we’ll continue to share ways to celebrate Black excellence and joy, so stay tuned!
**[It’s not too late to share your favorites! What are your favorite movies, songs, artists, or businesses that help you celebrate Black joy?](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230217-2193&t=1&akid=2193%2E1082990%2EkLhTOg)**
**[Share »](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230217-2193&t=2&akid=2193%2E1082990%2EkLhTOg)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Cori
P.S. Cori is fighting for working people every day on Capitol Hill. [**Can you chip in $5 today to support our movement?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230217.IIeAHt&amount=5&refcode=em20230217-2193&t=3&akid=2193%2E1082990%2EkLhTOg)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58883205/392537971/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JjY2RiNmYtMWFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=epZc4hiLSn9fi0Ys6KnuUCNDncUrnGF5XXgIzIhblbQ=)

Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! [_**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and HER Time**._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58883206/392537972/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JjY2RiNmYtMWFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=epZc4hiLSn9fi0Ys6KnuUCNDncUrnGF5XXgIzIhblbQ=) But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Wisconsin’s last elections have been decided by the slimmest of margins. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than _one point._ Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation.**In fact,_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. ** So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game _(we’ve done it before!)_ but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: [_**Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and HER Time? A contribution now pays off big-time for the coming months as we move full steam ahead toward Election Day 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58883207/392537973/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JjY2RiNmYtMWFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=epZc4hiLSn9fi0Ys6KnuUCNDncUrnGF5XXgIzIhblbQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Balwin and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58883208/392537974/-523917261?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JjY2RiNmYtMWFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=epZc4hiLSn9fi0Ys6KnuUCNDncUrnGF5XXgIzIhblbQ=)

clean_body: | = Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! = But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Wisconsin’s last elections have been decided by the slimmest of margins. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation.In fact,The Hill has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Balwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much for your continued support. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Focused on our families and our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Everything I’m fighting for in Congress — from defending our democracy from extreme MAGA Republican overreach to delivering for communities in NY-10 — is all about standing up against corruption and injustice to protect our **families** , our **freedoms** , and our **future**. I returned back to NY-10 for our two-week district work period to meet with community members and organizations and learn how to better advocate for them in Washington. This week, we’re focused on **our families and our future.**

* * *

**FIGHTING FOR OUR FUTURE** Fighting for our future, of course, means we must confront the most important challenge facing us right now: the climate crisis. And as our climate warms and sea levels rise, it’s critical that we adapt New York City’s infrastructure to withstand future disasters and prioritize frontline communities. **That’s why I wrote a letter to Mayor Eric Adams this week calling for his support for a reimagining of the Manhattan anchorage of the Brooklyn Bridge into a public park and community hub.** Currently, the dilapidated area under the Bridge cuts off Chinatown from the South Street Seaport and the Financial District, and deters foot traffic from the Bridge. The redevelopment of this aging infrastructure is an important opportunity to support a traditionally underserved neighborhood, provide much needed public space to the community, and reconnect vibrant areas of Manhattan. I’m inspired by the Brooklyn Bridge Manhattan community group’s plan for community-driven redevelopment, and I’m committed to being a partner in this work until their vision is fully realized. **I also joined my colleagues in city, state and federal government to urge the US Department of Transportation to support limiting the Brooklyn Queens Expressway redesign to 2-lane traffic in each direction.** Widening the highway will increase our dependency on cars and set us back on our climate goals. Instead, we should be prioritizing water, rail, and public transportation as much as possible as we reimagine the future of transporting freight and passengers. To that end, I also visited the Red Hook Terminal and discussed ways to revitalize the port to increase the use of marine transportation for freight to reduce diesel truck dependence, part of the future pathway toward reducing fossil fuel pollution. **And finally, I joined Council member Alexa Aviles to support an environmental study of the impact of last mile warehouses in the environmental justice communities in Sunset Park and Red Hook.**

* * *

**FIGHTING FOR NY-10’S FAMILIES** **On Monday, I visited with leaders of Mixteca** — a community-based organization in Sunset Park that does incredible work supporting New York’s Mexican and Latin American immigrant communities. Mixteca has been on the front lines assisting families during the pandemic and now providing much needed services to the thousands of migrants arriving in the City. And I got to taste some amazing churros! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58883263/392538309/-584945951?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWQ2MThmZi0xYWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRkKRPg4Pfczh-RgI1zIW1OBxnrD5HUZPSb8m-zL8Es=) **Earlier this week, I had the distinct honor to meet with the families of NY-10’s Ukraine East Village.** The meeting was a testament to the spirit of the Ukrainian people, and I was impressed by the passion and dedication of everyone there. I will continue to support Ukraine, and the Ukrainian constituents of NY-10, in the face of Putin’s unjust attacks on their sovereignty and democracy. **And just yesterday, I joined Congressman Jerry Nadler in signing a letter to Mayor Adams to release the Giuliani Administration’s records on the scope of the health threats facing 9/11 responders and survivors.** I was living in downtown Manhattan on September 11th, and I’ll never forget the heroes from that day. First responders, survivors, their families, and my constituents deserve full transparency to understand the toxins they were exposed to and the dangers to their health following the 9/11 attack, as well as the continued health risks that continue to arise out of that tragedy.

* * *

**It is great to be back in NY-10, and I want you to know that all of this work is only possible because of this incredible community of grassroots supporters. You keep me fighting for your values — whether that’s building a climate-resilient future in New York City, standing up to Putin and his despicable attacks on Ukraine, or making sure the voices of working families are heard in the halls of Congress. I need you by my side and would be grateful for your support for this important work. I can’t do it without you!** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58883265/392538311/-584945951?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWQ2MThmZi0xYWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRkKRPg4Pfczh-RgI1zIW1OBxnrD5HUZPSb8m-zL8Es=)

clean_body: | Peter, Everything I’m fighting for in Congress — from defending our democracy from extreme MAGA Republican overreach to delivering for communities in NY-10 — is all about standing up against corruption and injustice to protect our families , our freedoms , and our future. I returned back to NY-10 for our two-week district work period to meet with community members and organizations and learn how to better advocate for them in Washington. This week, we’re focused on our families and our future. FIGHTING FOR OUR FUTURE Fighting for our future, of course, means we must confront the most important challenge facing us right now: the climate crisis. And as our climate warms and sea levels rise, it’s critical that we adapt New York City’s infrastructure to withstand future disasters and prioritize frontline communities. That’s why I wrote a letter to Mayor Eric Adams this week calling for his support for a reimagining of the Manhattan anchorage of the Brooklyn Bridge into a public park and community hub. Currently, the dilapidated area under the Bridge cuts off Chinatown from the South Street Seaport and the Financial District, and deters foot traffic from the Bridge. The redevelopment of this aging infrastructure is an important opportunity to support a traditionally underserved neighborhood, provide much needed public space to the community, and reconnect vibrant areas of Manhattan. I’m inspired by the Brooklyn Bridge Manhattan community group’s plan for community-driven redevelopment, and I’m committed to being a partner in this work until their vision is fully realized. I also joined my colleagues in city, state and federal government to urge the US Department of Transportation to support limiting the Brooklyn Queens Expressway redesign to 2-lane traffic in each direction. Widening the highway will increase our dependency on cars and set us back on our climate goals. Instead, we should be prioritizing water, rail, and public transportation as much as possible as we reimagine the future of transporting freight and passengers. To that end, I also visited the Red Hook Terminal and discussed ways to revitalize the port to increase the use of marine transportation for freight to reduce diesel truck dependence, part of the future pathway toward reducing fossil fuel pollution. And finally, I joined Council member Alexa Aviles to support an environmental study of the impact of last mile warehouses in the environmental justice communities in Sunset Park and Red Hook. FIGHTING FOR NY-10’S FAMILIES On Monday, I visited with leaders of Mixteca — a community-based organization in Sunset Park that does incredible work supporting New York’s Mexican and Latin American immigrant communities. Mixteca has been on the front lines assisting families during the pandemic and now providing much needed services to the thousands of migrants arriving in the City. And I got to taste some amazing churros! = Earlier this week, I had the distinct honor to meet with the families of NY-10’s Ukraine East Village. The meeting was a testament to the spirit of the Ukrainian people, and I was impressed by the passion and dedication of everyone there. I will continue to support Ukraine, and the Ukrainian constituents of NY-10, in the face of Putin’s unjust attacks on their sovereignty and democracy. And just yesterday, I joined Congressman Jerry Nadler in signing a letter to Mayor Adams to release the Giuliani Administration’s records on the scope of the health threats facing 9/11 responders and survivors. I was living in downtown Manhattan on September 11th, and I’ll never forget the heroes from that day. First responders, survivors, their families, and my constituents deserve full transparency to understand the toxins they were exposed to and the dangers to their health following the 9/11 attack, as well as the continued health risks that continue to arise out of that tragedy. It is great to be back in NY-10, and I want you to know that all of this work is only possible because of this incredible community of grassroots supporters. You keep me fighting for your values — whether that’s building a climate-resilient future in New York City, standing up to Putin and his despicable attacks on Ukraine, or making sure the voices of working families are heard in the halls of Congress. I need you by my side and would be grateful for your support for this important work. I can’t do it without you! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = All my best, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

| Team –

It’s no surprise that President Biden is a busy man. So when I had a chance to speak with him on his way out of the State of the Union address last week, I used our time to talk to him about the type of investments we need in West Michigan. (At the request of my sons, I also snapped a quick selfie!)

Like so many places across the country, we need support via investments in infrastructure and job creation. We also have the unique privilege of being home to the Great Lakes, an incredible resource that we are honored to protect. I consistently hear from my constituents that protecting the Great Lakes is a top priority for them, as are combating climate change, safeguarding reproductive rights, and fixing our broken immigration system. name: CaucusRoom
subject: Disaster Aid Denied
body:
Biden finally speaks out about the UFOs. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! It has been 13 days since the Chinese Spy Balloon was shot down and Biden[finally addressed the American people](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-y/).**
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-t/) **Eyes on the Skies** **[Two US F-35 fighter jets intercepted a Russian fighter aircraft](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-i/)** Tuesday as it approached Alaska's Air Defense Identification Zone. **GOP Visits the Border** The White House slammed House Republicans' upcoming trip to the U.S.-Mexico border,**[characterizing the move as a "partisan publicity" stunt.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-d/) **_Oh, so only democrats are allowed to visit the open border?_ **Disaster Aid Denied** The Biden administration **[turned down Ohio Gov. DeWine's request for federal disaster assistance after a train derailment in East Palestine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-h/)** caused several hazardous chemicals to be released into the air and waterways. **Where's Pete?** Voicing their concerns at a town hall on Wednesday night, [**Ohio residents impacted by this month's toxic train derailment**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-k/) asked where Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg was. **Fleeing the White House** Laura Rosenberger,**[Biden's top adviser on matters related to China and Taiwan](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-u/), **will step down in March, in addition to his senior director for Russia. **Haley for President** Former South Carolina governor and UN Ambassador[ ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-o/)[**Nikki Haley announced Tuesday that she is running for president**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-x/)[,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-m/) seeking the Republican nomination for the 2024 election. If you are a fan, you can join the **[Nikki Haley for President group.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-c/)**

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* **[Counterattack](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-a/)!**
* All they do is**[lie to us](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-f/).**
* Everything **[is fine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-z/).**
* He was just**[minding his own business](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-v/).**

**Join us Monday, February 20th for the[ CaucusRoom Council Meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-e/).** [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhkhdk-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
